Output
"{\"content\":\"1: {% import 'common.yml.j2' as common %}\\n2: {% import 'upload.yml.j2' as upload %}\\n3: \\n4: {%- block name -%}\\n5: # Template is at:    .github/templates/linux_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2\\n6: # Generation script: .github/scripts/generate_ci_workflows.py\\n7: name: !{{ build_environment }}\\n8: {%- endblock %}\\n9: \\n10: \\n11: on:\\n12:   push:\\n13:     {%- if branches == \\\"nightly\\\" %}\\n14:     # NOTE: Meta Employees can trigger new nightlies using: https://fburl.com/trigger_pytorch_nightly_build\\n15:     {%- endif %}\\n16:     branches:\\n17:       - !{{ branches }}\\n18:     {%- if branches == \\\"nightly\\\" %}\\n19:     tags:\\n20:       # NOTE: Binary build pipelines should only get triggered on release candidate builds\\n21:       # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\\n22:       - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\\n23:     {%- endif %}\\n24: {%- for label in ciflow_config.labels | sort %}\\n25:     {%- if loop.first and branches != \\\"nightly\\\" %}\\n26:     tags:\\n27:     {%- endif %}\\n28:       - '!{{ label }}/*'\\n29: {%- endfor %}\\n30:   workflow_dispatch:\\n31: \\n32: permissions:\\n33:   id-token: write\\n34: \\n35: env:\\n36:   # Needed for conda builds\\n37:   {%- if \\\"aarch64\\\" in build_environment %}\\n38:   ALPINE_IMAGE: \\\"arm64v8/alpine\\\"\\n39:   {%- elif \\\"s390x\\\" in build_environment %}\\n40:   ALPINE_IMAGE: \\\"docker.io/s390x/alpine\\\"\\n41:   {%- else %}\\n42:   ALPINE_IMAGE: \\\"308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/tool/alpine\\\"\\n43:   {%- endif %}\\n44:   AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1\\n45:   BINARY_ENV_FILE: /tmp/env\\n46:   BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: !{{ build_environment }}\\n47:   GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\\n48:   PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}\\n49:   PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR: /artifacts\\n50:   PYTORCH_ROOT: /pytorch\\n51:   SHA1: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha || github.sha }}\\n52:   SKIP_ALL_TESTS: 0\\n53: !{{ common.concurrency(build_environment) }}\\n54: \\n55: jobs:\\n56:   get-label-type:\\n57:     if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\\n58:     name: get-label-type\\n59:     uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\\n60:     with:\\n61:       triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\\n62:       issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\\n63:       curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\\n64:       curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\\n65: \\n66: {%- for config in build_configs %}\\n67:   !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}-build:\\n68:     if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\\n69:     uses: ./.github/workflows/_binary-build-linux.yml\\n70:     needs: get-label-type\\n71:     with:!{{ upload.binary_env_as_input(config) }}\\n72:       {%- if \\\"aarch64\\\" in build_environment %}\\n73:       runner_prefix: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\\\"\\n74:       runs_on: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\\n75:       ALPINE_IMAGE: \\\"arm64v8/alpine\\\"\\n76:       {%- elif \\\"s390x\\\" in build_environment %}\\n77:       runs_on: linux.s390x\\n78:       ALPINE_IMAGE: \\\"docker.io/s390x/alpine\\\"\\n79:       timeout-minutes: 420\\n80:       {%- elif config[\\\"gpu_arch_type\\\"] == \\\"rocm\\\" %}\\n81:       runner_prefix: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\\\"\\n82:       timeout-minutes: 300\\n83:       {%- elif \\\"conda\\\" in build_environment and config[\\\"gpu_arch_type\\\"] == \\\"cuda\\\" %}\\n84:       runner_prefix: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\\\"\\n85:       runs_on: linux.24xlarge.ephemeral\\n86:       {%- else %}\\n87:       runner_prefix: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\\\"\\n88:       {%- endif %}\\n89:       build_name: !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}\\n90:       build_environment: !{{ build_environment }}\\n91:       {%- if config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements is defined and config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements|d('')|length > 0  %}\\n92:       PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS: !{{ config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements }}\\n93:       {%- endif %}\\n94:       {%- if config[\\\"gpu_arch_type\\\"] == \\\"cuda-aarch64\\\" %}\\n95:       timeout-minutes: 420\\n96:       {%- endif %}\\n97:     secrets:\\n98:       github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\\n99: \\n100:   !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}-test:  # Testing\\n101:     if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\\n102:     needs:\\n103:       - !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}-build\\n104:       - get-label-type\\n105:     {%- if config[\\\"gpu_arch_type\\\"] not in [\\\"rocm\\\", \\\"xpu\\\"] %}\\n106:     uses: ./.github/workflows/_binary-test-linux.yml\\n107:     with:!{{ upload.binary_env_as_input(config) }}\\n108:       build_name: !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}\\n109:       build_environment: !{{ build_environment }}\\n110:       {%- if \\\"aarch64\\\" in build_environment %}\\n111:       runner_prefix: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\\\"\\n112:       runs_on: linux.arm64.2xlarge\\n113:       ALPINE_IMAGE: \\\"arm64v8/alpine\\\"\\n114:       {%- elif \\\"s390x\\\" in build_environment %}\\n115:       runs_on: linux.s390x\\n116:       ALPINE_IMAGE: \\\"docker.io/s390x/alpine\\\"\\n117:       {%- elif config[\\\"gpu_arch_type\\\"] == \\\"rocm\\\" %}\\n118:       runs_on: linux.rocm.gpu\\n119:       {%- elif config[\\\"gpu_arch_type\\\"] == \\\"cuda\\\" and config[\\\"gpu_arch_version\\\"] in [\\\"12.6\\\"] %}\\n120:       runner_prefix: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\\\"\\n121:       runs_on: linux.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu  # 12.6 build can use maxwell (sm_50) runner\\n122:       {%- elif config[\\\"gpu_arch_type\\\"] == \\\"cuda\\\" %}\\n123:       runner_prefix: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\\\"\\n124:       runs_on: linux.g4dn.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu # 12.8+ builds need sm_70+ runner\\n125:       {%- else %}\\n126:       runner_prefix: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\\\"\\n127:       runs_on: linux.4xlarge\\n128:       {%- endif %}\\n129:     secrets:\\n130:       github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\\n131:     {%- elif config[\\\"gpu_arch_type\\\"] == \\\"xpu\\\" %}\\n132:     runs-on: linux.idc.xpu\\n133:     timeout-minutes: !{{ common.timeout_minutes }}\\n134:     !{{ upload.binary_env(config) }}\\n135:     permissions:\\n136:       id-token: write\\n137:       contents: read\\n138:     steps:\\n139:       - name: Setup XPU\\n140:         uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/setup-xpu@release/2.10\\n141:       - name: configure aws credentials\\n142:         id: aws_creds\\n143:         uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4\\n144:         with:\\n145:           role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::308535385114:role/gha_workflow_s3_and_ecr_read_only\\n146:           aws-region: us-east-1\\n147:       - name: Login to Amazon ECR\\n148:         id: login-ecr\\n149:         uses: aws-actions/amazon-ecr-login@v2\\n150:       - uses: !{{ common.download_artifact_action }}\\n151:         name: Download Build Artifacts\\n152:         with:\\n153:           name: !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}\\n154:           path: \\\"${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/\\\"\\n155:       !{{ common.checkout(deep_clone=False, directory=\\\"pytorch\\\", checkout_pr_head=False) }}\\n156:       - name: Calculate docker image\\n157:         id: calculate-docker-image\\n158:         uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/calculate-docker-image@release/2.10\\n159:         with:\\n160:           docker-registry: ${{ startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/ciflow/') && '308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com' || 'docker.io' }}\\n161:           docker-image-name: !{{ config[\\\"container_image\\\"] }}\\n162:           custom-tag-prefix: !{{ config[\\\"container_image_tag_prefix\\\"] }}\\n163:           docker-build-dir: .ci/docker\\n164:           working-directory: pytorch\\n165:       - name: Pull Docker image\\n166:         uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/pull-docker-image@release/2.10\\n167:         with:\\n168:           docker-image: ${{ steps.calculate-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\\n169:       - name: Test Pytorch binary\\n170:         uses: ./pytorch/.github/actions/test-pytorch-binary\\n171:         env:\\n172:           DOCKER_IMAGE: ${{ steps.calculate-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\\n173:       - name: Teardown XPU\\n174:         uses: ./.github/actions/teardown-xpu\\n175:     {%- else %}\\n176:     runs-on: linux.rocm.gpu.mi250.1\\n177:     timeout-minutes: !{{ common.timeout_minutes }}\\n178:     !{{ upload.binary_env(config) }}\\n179:     permissions:\\n180:       id-token: write\\n181:       contents: read\\n182:     steps:\\n183:       - name: Setup ROCm\\n184:         uses: ./.github/actions/setup-rocm\\n185:       - uses: !{{ common.download_artifact_action }}\\n186:         name: Download Build Artifacts\\n187:         with:\\n188:           name: !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}\\n189:           path: \\\"${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/\\\"\\n190:       !{{ common.checkout(deep_clone=False, directory=\\\"pytorch\\\", checkout_pr_head=False) }}\\n191:       - name: ROCm set GPU_FLAG\\n192:         run: |\\n193:           echo \\\"GPU_FLAG=--device=/dev/mem --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add video --group-add daemon\\\" >> \\\"${GITHUB_ENV}\\\"\\n194:       - name: configure aws credentials\\n195:         id: aws_creds\\n196:         if: ${{ startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/ciflow/') }}\\n197:         uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4\\n198:         with:\\n199:           role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::308535385114:role/gha_workflow_s3_and_ecr_read_only\\n200:           aws-region: us-east-1\\n201:           role-duration-seconds: 18000\\n202:       - name: Calculate docker image\\n203:         id: calculate-docker-image\\n204:         uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/calculate-docker-image@release/2.10\\n205:         with:\\n206:           docker-registry: ${{ startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/ciflow/') && '308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com' || 'docker.io' }}\\n207:           docker-image-name: !{{ config[\\\"container_image\\\"] }}\\n208:           custom-tag-prefix: !{{ config[\\\"container_image_tag_prefix\\\"] }}\\n209:           docker-build-dir: .ci/docker\\n210:           working-directory: pytorch\\n211:       - name: Pull Docker image\\n212:         uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/pull-docker-image@release/2.10\\n213:         with:\\n214:           docker-image: ${{ steps.calculate-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\\n215:       - name: Test Pytorch binary\\n216:         uses: ./pytorch/.github/actions/test-pytorch-binary\\n217:         env:\\n218:           DOCKER_IMAGE: ${{ steps.calculate-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\\n219:       - name: Teardown ROCm\\n220:         uses: ./.github/actions/teardown-rocm\\n221:     {%- endif %}\\n222: \\n223: {%- if branches == \\\"nightly\\\" %}\\n224:   !{{ upload.upload_binaries(config) }}\\n225: {%- endif %}\\n226: {% endfor %}\\n227: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/templates/linux_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2\"}"
41. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "path": ".github/templates/macos_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78"
}
Output
"{\"content\":\"1: {% import 'common.yml.j2' as common %}\\n2: {% import 'upload.yml.j2' as upload %}\\n3: \\n4: {%- block name -%}\\n5: # Template is at:    .github/templates/macos_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2\\n6: # Generation script: .github/scripts/generate_ci_workflows.py\\n7: name: !{{ build_environment }}\\n8: {%- endblock %}\\n9: \\n10: {%- macro set_runner_specific_vars() -%}\\n11:       # NOTE: These environment variables are put here so that they can be applied on every job equally\\n12:       #       They are also here because setting them at a workflow level doesn't give us access to the\\n13:       #       runner.temp variable, which we need.\\n14:       - name: Populate binary env\\n15:         shell: bash\\n16:         run: |\\n17:           # shellcheck disable=SC2129\\n18:           echo \\\"BINARY_ENV_FILE=${RUNNER_TEMP}/env\\\" >> \\\"${GITHUB_ENV}\\\"\\n19:           # shellcheck disable=SC2129\\n20:           echo \\\"PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR=${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts\\\" >> \\\"${GITHUB_ENV}\\\"\\n21:           # shellcheck disable=SC2129\\n22:           echo \\\"MAC_PACKAGE_WORK_DIR=${RUNNER_TEMP}\\\" >> \\\"${GITHUB_ENV}\\\"\\n23: {%- endmacro %}\\n24: \\n25: {%- macro setup_python(py_ver) -%}\\n26:       - name: Setup Python\\n27:         uses: actions/setup-python@v6\\n28:         with:\\n29:           # .4 version is min minor for 3.10, and also no-gil version of 3.13 needs at least 3.13.3\\n30:           python-version: \\\"!{{ py_ver.strip('t') + ('.4' if '3.14' not in py_ver else '.0') }}\\\"\\n31:           freethreaded: !{{ \\\"true\\\" if py_ver.endswith('t') else \\\"false\\\" }}\\n32: {%- endmacro %}\\n33: \\n34: on:\\n35: # TODO: Migrate to new ciflow trigger, reference https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/pull/70321\\n36:   push:\\n37:     # NOTE: Meta Employees can trigger new nightlies using: https://fburl.com/trigger_pytorch_nightly_build\\n38:     branches:\\n39:       - nightly\\n40:     tags:\\n41:       # NOTE: Binary build pipelines should only get triggered on release candidate builds\\n42:       # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\\n43:       - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\\n44: {%- for label in ciflow_config.labels | sort %}\\n45:     {%- if loop.first and branches != \\\"nightly\\\" %}\\n46:     tags:\\n47:     {%- endif %}\\n48:       - '!{{ label }}/*'\\n49: {%- endfor %}\\n50:   workflow_dispatch:\\n51: \\n52: env:\\n53:   ALPINE_IMAGE: \\\"308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/tool/alpine\\\"\\n54:   AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1\\n55:   BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: !{{ build_environment }}\\n56:   GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\\n57:   PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}\\n58:   SKIP_ALL_TESTS: 0\\n59: !{{ common.concurrency(build_environment) }}\\n60: \\n61: jobs:\\n62: {%- for config in build_configs %}\\n63:   !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}-build:\\n64:     if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\\n65:     runs-on: !{{ macos_runner }}\\n66:     timeout-minutes: !{{ common.timeout_minutes }}\\n67:     !{{ upload.binary_env(config, true) }}\\n68:     {%- if config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements is defined and config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements|d('')|length > 0  %}\\n69:       PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS: !{{ config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements }}\\n70:     {%- endif %}\\n71:     steps:\\n72:       !{{ set_runner_specific_vars() }}\\n73:       !{{ setup_python(config.get(\\\"python_version\\\", \\\"3.10\\\")) }}\\n74:       !{{ common.checkout(deep_clone=False, directory=\\\"pytorch\\\", checkout_pr_head=False) }}\\n75:       - name: Populate binary env\\n76:         run: |\\n77:           \\\"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_populate_env.sh\\\"\\n78:       - name: Build PyTorch binary\\n79:         run: |\\n80:           set -eux -o pipefail\\n81:           # shellcheck disable=SC1090\\n82:           source \\\"${BINARY_ENV_FILE:-/Users/distiller/project/env}\\\"\\n83:           mkdir -p \\\"$PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR\\\"\\n84: \\n85:           # Build\\n86:           USE_PYTORCH_METAL_EXPORT=1\\n87:           USE_COREML_DELEGATE=1\\n88:           TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME=\\\"${TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME//-/_}\\\"\\n89:           export USE_PYTORCH_METAL_EXPORT\\n90:           export USE_COREML_DELEGATE\\n91:           export TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME\\n92:           \\\"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.ci/wheel/build_wheel.sh\\\"\\n93: {%- if config[\\\"package_type\\\"] == \\\"wheel\\\" %}\\n94:       - name: Test PyTorch wheel\\n95:         run: |\\n96:           set -eux -o pipefail\\n97:           # shellcheck disable=SC1090\\n98:           source \\\"${BINARY_ENV_FILE:-/Users/distiller/project/env}\\\"\\n99:           pip uninstall -y \\\"$TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME\\\" || true\\n100:           pip uninstall -y \\\"$TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME\\\" || true\\n101: \\n102:           # Create new \\\"clean\\\" conda environment for testing\\n103: \\n104:           SMOKE_TEST_PARAMS=\\\"\\\"\\n105: \\n106:           # shellcheck disable=SC2086\\n107:           python -mvenv test_venv\\n108:           source test_venv/bin/activate\\n109:           pip install \\\"$PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR\\\"/*.whl numpy -v\\n110: \\n111:           # shellcheck disable=SC2086\\n112:           python \\\"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.ci/pytorch/smoke_test/smoke_test.py\\\" --package torchonly ${SMOKE_TEST_PARAMS}\\n113: {%- endif %}\\n114:       - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4.4.0\\n115:         if: always()\\n116:         with:\\n117:           name: !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}\\n118:           retention-days: 14\\n119:           if-no-files-found: error\\n120:           path: \\\"${{ env.PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR }}\\\"\\n121:   !{{ upload.upload_binaries(config, has_test=False, use_s3=False) }}\\n122: {%- endfor %}\\n123: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/templates/macos_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2\"}"

set_runner_specific_vars() -%}\\n11:       # NOTE: These environment variables are put here so that they can be applied on every job equally\\n12:       #       They are also here because setting them at a workflow level doesn't give us access to the\\n13:       #       runner.temp variable, which we need.\\n14:       - name: Populate binary env\\n15:         shell: bash\\n16:         run: |\\n17: nightlies using: https://fburl.com/trigger_pytorch_nightly_build\\n26:     {%- endif %}\\n27:     branches:\\n28:       - !{{ branches }}\\n29:     {%- if branches == \\\"nightly\\\" %}\\n30:     tags:\\n31:       # NOTE: Binary build pipelines should only get triggered on release candidate builds\\n32:       # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\\n33:       - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\\n34:     {%- endif %}\\n35: {%- for label in ciflow_config.labels | sort %}\\n36:     {%- if loop.first and branches != \\\"nightly\\\" %}\\n37:     tags:\\n38:     {%- endif %}\\n39:       - '!{{ label }}/*'\\n40: {%- endfor %}\\n41:   workflow_dispatch:\\n42: \\n43: env:\\n44:   # Needed for conda builds\\n45:   ALPINE_IMAGE: secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\\n49:   PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}\\n50:   SHA1: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha || github.sha }}\\n51:   SKIP_ALL_TESTS: 1\\n52:   OS: !{{ os github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\\n66:     name: get-label-type\\n67:     uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\\n68:     with:\\n69:       triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\\n70:       issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\\n71:       curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\\n72:       curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\\n73: \\n74: {%- for config in build_configs %}\\n75:   !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}-build:\\n76:     if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\\n77:     needs: get-label-type\\n78:     {%- if os == \\\"windows-arm64\\\" %}\\n79:     runs-on: \\\"windows-11-arm64-preview\\\"\\n80:     {%- else %}\\n81:     {%- if branches == \\\"nightly\\\" %}\\n82:     runs-on: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.12xlarge\\\"\\n83:     {%- else %}\\n84:     runs-on: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.12xlarge.nonephemeral\\\"\\n85:     {%- endif %}\\n86:     {%- endif %}\\n87:     timeout-minutes: !{{ common.timeout_minutes_windows_binary }}\\n88: PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS: !{{ config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements }}\\n91:     {%- endif %}\\n92:     steps:\\n93: {%- if os == \\\"windows-arm64\\\" %}\\n94:       - name: Populate binary env\\n95:         shell: cmd\\n96:         run: |\\n97:           echo BINARY_ENV_FILE=%RUNNER_TEMP%/env>> %GITHUB_ENV%\\n98:           echo PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR=%RUNNER_TEMP%/artifacts>> %GITHUB_ENV%\\n99:           echo WIN_PACKAGE_WORK_DIR=%RUNNER_TEMP%>> %GITHUB_ENV%\\n100:       - name: Bootstrap folders\\n101:         shell: cmd\\n102:         run: |\\n103:           mkdir \\\"%NIGHTLIES_PYTORCH_ROOT%\\\"\\n104:           mkdir \\\"%PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR%\\\"\\n105:       - name: Enable long paths\\n106:         shell: cmd\\n107:         run: |\\n108:           git config --system --get core.longpaths || echo \\\"core.longpaths is not set, setting it now\\\"\\n109:           git config --system core.longpaths true\\n110:       - name: Git checkout PyTorch\\n111:         uses: actions/checkout@v4\\n112:         with:\\n113:           path: \\\"pytorch\\\"\\n114:           submodules: recursive\\n115:       - name: Bootstrap Python\\n116:         shell: cmd\\n117:         run: |\\n118:           \\\"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_python.bat\\\"\\n119:       - name: Bootstrap APL\\n120:         shell: cmd\\n121:         run: |\\n122:           \\\"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_apl.bat\\\"\\n123:       - name: Bootstrap Rust\\n124:         shell: cmd\\n125:         run: |\\n126:           \\\"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_rust.bat\\\"\\n127:       - name: Bootstrap sccache\\n128:         shell: cmd\\n129:         run: |\\n130: \\\"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_libuv.bat\\\"\\n135: {%- else %}\\n136:       !{{ set_runner_specific_vars() }}\\n137:       !{{ common.setup_ec2_windows() }}\\n138:       !{{ common.checkout(deep_clone=False, directory=\\\"pytorch\\\", checkout_pr_head=False) }}\\n139: {%- endif %}\\n140:       - name: Populate binary env\\n141:         shell: bash\\n142:         run: |\\n143:           \\\"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_populate_env.sh\\\"\\n144:       - name: Build PyTorch binary\\n145:         shell: bash\\n146:         run: |\\n147:           \\\"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_windows_build.sh\\\"\\n148:       - uses: !{{ common.upload_artifact_action }}\\n149:         if: always()\\n150:         with:\\n151:           name: !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}\\n152:           retention-days: 14\\n153:           if-no-files-found: error\\n154:           path: \\\"${{ env.PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR }}\\\"\\n155: {%- if os != \\\"windows-arm64\\\" %}\\n156:       !{{ common.wait_and_kill_ssh_windows('pytorch') }}\\n157: {% endif %}\\n158:   !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}-test:  # Testing\\n159:     if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\\n160:     needs:\\n161:       - !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}-build\\n162:       - get-label-type\\n163: {%- if os == \\\"windows-arm64\\\" %}\\n164:     runs-on: \\\"windows-11-arm64-preview\\\"\\n165: {%- else %}\\n166: {%- if config[\\\"gpu_arch_type\\\"] == \\\"cuda\\\" %}\\n167: {%- if branches == \\\"nightly\\\" %}\\n168:     runs-on: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.g4dn.xlarge\\\"\\n169: {%- else %}\\n170:     runs-on: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.g4dn.xlarge.nonephemeral\\\"\\n171: {%- endif %}\\n172: {%- else %}\\n173: {%- if branches == \\\"nightly\\\" %}\\n174:     runs-on: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.4xlarge\\\"\\n175: {%- else %}\\n176:     runs-on: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.4xlarge.nonephemeral\\\"\\n177: {%- endif %}\\n178: {%- endif %}\\n179: {%- endif %}\\n180:     timeout-minutes: !{{ common.timeout_minutes_windows_binary }}\\n181:     !{{ upload.binary_env(config, True) }}\\n182:     steps:\\n183: {%- if os == \\\"windows-arm64\\\" %}\\n184:       - name: Populate binary env\\n185:         shell: cmd\\n186:         run: |\\n187:           echo BINARY_ENV_FILE=%RUNNER_TEMP%/env>> %GITHUB_ENV%\\n188:           echo PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR=%RUNNER_TEMP%/artifacts>> %GITHUB_ENV%\\n189:           echo WIN_PACKAGE_WORK_DIR=%RUNNER_TEMP%>> %GITHUB_ENV%\\n190:       - name: Enable long paths\\n191:         shell: cmd\\n192:         run: |\\n193:           git config --system --get core.longpaths || echo \\\"core.longpaths is not set, setting it now\\\"\\n194:           git config --system core.longpaths true\\n195:       - name: Git checkout PyTorch\\n196:         uses: actions/checkout@v4\\n197:         with:\\n198:           path: \\\"pytorch\\\"\\n199:           submodules: recursive\\n200:       - name: Bootstrap APL\\n201:         shell: cmd\\n202:         run: |\\n203:           \\\"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_apl.bat\\\"\\n204:       - name: Bootstrap Python\\n205:         shell: cmd\\n206:         run: |\\n207:           \\\"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_python.bat\\\"\\n208:       - name: Bootstrap Rust\\n209:         shell: cmd\\n210:         run: |\\n211: directory=\\\"pytorch\\\", checkout_pr_head=False) }}\\n215:       !{{ set_runner_specific_vars() }}\\n216: {%- endif %}\\n217:       - uses: !{{ common.download_artifact_action }}\\n218:         name: Download Build Artifacts\\n219:         with:\\n220:           name: !{{ config[\\\"build_name\\\"] }}\\n221:           path: \\\"${{ env.PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR }}\\\"\\n222:       - name:       shell: bash\\n228:         run: |\\n229:           \\\"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_windows_test.sh\\\"\\n230: {%- if os != \\\"windows-arm64\\\" %}\\n231:       !{{ common.wait_and_kill_ssh_windows('pytorch') }}\\n232: {%- endif %}\\n233:   {%- if branches == \\\"nightly\\\" %}\\n234:   !{{ upload.upload_binaries(config, True) }}\\n235:   {%- endif %}\\n236: {%- %}\",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/templates/windows_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2\"}"
43. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "{%- set upload_artifact_s3_action = \"seemethere/upload-artifact-s3@v5\" -%}\n{%- set download_artifact_s3_action = \"seemethere/download-artifact-s3@v4\" -%}\n{%- set upload_artifact_action = \"actions/upload-artifact@v4.4.0\" -%}\n{%- set download_artifact_action = \"actions/download-artifact@v4.1.7\" -%}\n\n{%- set timeout_minutes = 240 -%}\n{%- set timeout_minutes_windows_binary = 360 -%}\n\n{%- macro concurrency(build_environment) -%}\nconcurrency:\n  group: !{{ build_environment }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n{%- endmacro -%}\n\n{%- macro display_ec2_information() -%}\n      - name: Display EC2 information\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -euo pipefail\n          function get_ec2_metadata() {\n            # Pulled from instance metadata endpoint for EC2\n            # see https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/instancedata-data-retrieval.html\n            category=$1\n            curl -H \"X-aws-ec2-metadata-token: $(curl -s -X PUT \"http://169.254.169.254/latest/api/token\" -H \"X-aws-ec2-metadata-token-ttl-seconds: 30\")\" -fsSL \"http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/${category}\"\n          }\n          echo \"ami-id: $(get_ec2_metadata ami-id)\"\n          echo \"instance-id: $(get_ec2_metadata instance-id)\"\n          echo \"instance-type: $(get_ec2_metadata instance-type)\"\n          echo \"system info $(uname -a)\"\n{%- endmacro -%}\n\n{%- macro setup_ec2_windows() -%}\n      !{{ display_ec2_information() }}\n      - name: \"[FB EMPLOYEES] Enable SSH (Click me for login details)\"\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/setup-ssh@release/2.10\n        continue-on-error: true\n        with:\n          github-secret: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n      - name: Enable git long paths and symlinks on Windows and disable fsmonitor daemon\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          git config --global core.longpaths true\n          git config --global core.symlinks true\n\n          # https://git-scm.com/docs/git-fsmonitor--daemon.  The daemon could lock\n          # the directory on Windows and prevent GHA from checking out as reported\n          # in https://github.com/actions/checkout/issues/1018\n          git config --global core.fsmonitor false\n      # Needed for binary builds, see: https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/issues/73339#issuecomment-1058981560\n      - name: Enable long paths on Windows\n        shell: powershell\n        run: |\n          Set-ItemProperty -Path \"HKLM:\\\\SYSTEM\\\\CurrentControlSet\\\\Control\\\\FileSystem\" -Name \"LongPathsEnabled\" -Value 1\n      # Since it's just a defensive command, the workflow should continue even the command fails. This step can be\n      # removed once Windows Defender is removed from the AMI\n      - name: Disables Windows Defender scheduled and real-time scanning for files in directories used by PyTorch\n        continue-on-error: true\n        shell: powershell\n        run: |\n          Add-MpPreference -ExclusionPath $(Get-Location).tostring(),$Env:TEMP -ErrorAction Ignore\n          # Let's both exclude the path and disable Windows Defender completely just to be sure\n          # that it doesn't interfere\n          Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $True -ErrorAction Ignore\n{%- endmacro -%}\n\n{%- macro apply_filter() -%}\n      - name: Check if the job is disabled\n        id: filter\n        # Binary workflows checkout to pytorch subdirectory instead\n        uses: ./pytorch/.github/actions/filter-test-configs\n        with:\n          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n          # NB: Use a mock test matrix with a default value here. After filtering, if the\n          # returned matrix is empty, it means that the job is disabled\n          test-matrix: |\n            { include: [\n              { config: \"default\" },\n            ]}\n{%- endmacro -%}\n\n{%- macro checkout(submodules=\"recursive\", deep_clone=True, directory=\"\", repository=\"pytorch/pytorch\", branch=\"\", checkout_pr_head=True) -%}\n      - name: Checkout !{{ 'PyTorch' if repository == \"pytorch/pytorch\" else repository }}\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n      {%- if branch %}\n          ref: !{{ branch }}\n      {%- elif checkout_pr_head %}\n          ref: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.head.sha || github.sha }}\n      {%- endif %}\n      {%- if deep_clone %}\n          # deep clone, to allow use of git merge-base\n          fetch-depth: 0\n      {%- endif %}\n          submodules: !{{ submodules }}\n      {%- if repository != \"pytorch/pytorch\" %}\n          repository: !{{ repository }}\n      {%- endif %}\n      {%- if directory %}\n          path: !{{ directory }}\n      {%- endif %}\n          show-progress: false\n      - name: Clean !{{ 'PyTorch' if repository == \"pytorch/pytorch\" else repository }} checkout\n        run: |\n          # Remove any artifacts from the previous checkouts\n          git clean -fxd\n      {%- if directory%}\n        working-directory: !{{ directory }}\n      {%- endif %}\n{%- endmacro -%}\n\n{%- macro wait_and_kill_ssh_windows(pytorch_directory=\"\") -%}\n      - name: Wait until all sessions have drained\n        shell: powershell\n{%- if pytorch_directory %}\n        working-directory: !{{ pytorch_directory }}\n{%- endif %}\n        if: always()\n        timeout-minutes: 120\n        run: |\n          .github\\scripts\\wait_for_ssh_to_drain.ps1\n      - name: Kill active ssh sessions if still around (Useful if workflow was cancelled)\n        shell: powershell\n{%- if pytorch_directory %}\n        working-directory: !{{ pytorch_directory }}\n{%- endif %}\n        if: always()\n        run: |\n          .github\\scripts\\kill_active_ssh_sessions.ps1\n{%- endmacro -%}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/templates/common.yml.j2"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/templates/common.yml.j2"
44. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "{% import 'common.yml.j2' as common %}\n{% import 'upload.yml.j2' as upload %}\n\n{%- block name -%}\n# Template is at:    .github/templates/linux_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2\n# Generation script: .github/scripts/generate_ci_workflows.py\nname: !{{ build_environment }}\n{%- endblock %}\n\n\non:\n  push:\n    {%- if branches == \"nightly\" %}\n    # NOTE: Meta Employees can trigger new nightlies using: https://fburl.com/trigger_pytorch_nightly_build\n    {%- endif %}\n    branches:\n      - !{{ branches }}\n    {%- if branches == \"nightly\" %}\n    tags:\n      # NOTE: Binary build pipelines should only get triggered on release candidate builds\n      # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\n    {%- endif %}\n{%- for label in ciflow_config.labels | sort %}\n    {%- if loop.first and branches != \"nightly\" %}\n    tags:\n    {%- endif %}\n      - '!{{ label }}/*'\n{%- endfor %}\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions:\n  id-token: write\n\nenv:\n  # Needed for conda builds\n  {%- if \"aarch64\" in build_environment %}\n  ALPINE_IMAGE: \"arm64v8/alpine\"\n  {%- elif \"s390x\" in build_environment %}\n  ALPINE_IMAGE: \"docker.io/s390x/alpine\"\n  {%- else %}\n  ALPINE_IMAGE: \"308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/tool/alpine\"\n  {%- endif %}\n  AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1\n  BINARY_ENV_FILE: /tmp/env\n  BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: !{{ build_environment }}\n  GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n  PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}\n  PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR: /artifacts\n  PYTORCH_ROOT: /pytorch\n  SHA1: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha || github.sha }}\n  SKIP_ALL_TESTS: 0\n!{{ common.concurrency(build_environment) }}\n\njobs:\n  get-label-type:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n{%- for config in build_configs %}\n  !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}-build:\n    if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_binary-build-linux.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:!{{ upload.binary_env_as_input(config) }}\n      {%- if \"aarch64\" in build_environment %}\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      runs_on: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n      ALPINE_IMAGE: \"arm64v8/alpine\"\n      {%- elif \"s390x\" in build_environment %}\n      runs_on: linux.s390x\n      ALPINE_IMAGE: \"docker.io/s390x/alpine\"\n      timeout-minutes: 420\n      {%- elif config[\"gpu_arch_type\"] == \"rocm\" %}\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      timeout-minutes: 300\n      {%- elif \"conda\" in build_environment and config[\"gpu_arch_type\"] == \"cuda\" %}\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      runs_on: linux.24xlarge.ephemeral\n      {%- else %}\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      {%- endif %}\n      build_name: !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}\n      build_environment: !{{ build_environment }}\n      {%- if config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements is defined and config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements|d('')|length > 0  %}\n      PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS: !{{ config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements }}\n      {%- endif %}\n      {%- if config[\"gpu_arch_type\"] == \"cuda-aarch64\" %}\n      timeout-minutes: 420\n      {%- endif %}\n    secrets:\n      github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n  !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}-test:  # Testing\n    if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    needs:\n      - !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}-build\n      - get-label-type\n    {%- if config[\"gpu_arch_type\"] not in [\"rocm\", \"xpu\"] %}\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_binary-test-linux.yml\n    with:!{{ upload.binary_env_as_input(config) }}\n      build_name: !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}\n      build_environment: !{{ build_environment }}\n      {%- if \"aarch64\" in build_environment %}\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      runs_on: linux.arm64.2xlarge\n      ALPINE_IMAGE: \"arm64v8/alpine\"\n      {%- elif \"s390x\" in build_environment %}\n      runs_on: linux.s390x\n      ALPINE_IMAGE: \"docker.io/s390x/alpine\"\n      {%- elif config[\"gpu_arch_type\"] == \"rocm\" %}\n      runs_on: linux.rocm.gpu\n      {%- elif config[\"gpu_arch_type\"] == \"cuda\" and config[\"gpu_arch_version\"] in [\"12.6\"] %}\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      runs_on: linux.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu  # 12.6 build can use maxwell (sm_50) runner\n      {%- elif config[\"gpu_arch_type\"] == \"cuda\" %}\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      runs_on: linux.g4dn.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu # 12.8+ builds need sm_70+ runner\n      {%- else %}\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      runs_on: linux.4xlarge\n      {%- endif %}\n    secrets:\n      github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n    {%- elif config[\"gpu_arch_type\"] == \"xpu\" %}\n    runs-on: linux.idc.xpu\n    timeout-minutes: !{{ common.timeout_minutes }}\n    !{{ upload.binary_env(config) }}\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    steps:\n      - name: Setup XPU\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/setup-xpu@release/2.10\n      - name: configure aws credentials\n        id: aws_creds\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::308535385114:role/gha_workflow_s3_and_ecr_read_only\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n      - name: Login to Amazon ECR\n        id: login-ecr\n        uses: aws-actions/amazon-ecr-login@v2\n      - uses: !{{ common.download_artifact_action }}\n        name: Download Build Artifacts\n        with:\n          name: !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}\n          path: \"${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/\"\n      !{{ common.checkout(deep_clone=False, directory=\"pytorch\", checkout_pr_head=False) }}\n      - name: Calculate docker image\n        id: calculate-docker-image\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/calculate-docker-image@release/2.10\n        with:\n          docker-registry: ${{ startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/ciflow/') && '308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com' || 'docker.io' }}\n          docker-image-name: !{{ config[\"container_image\"] }}\n          custom-tag-prefix: !{{ config[\"container_image_tag_prefix\"] }}\n          docker-build-dir: .ci/docker\n          working-directory: pytorch\n      - name: Pull Docker image\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/pull-docker-image@release/2.10\n        with:\n          docker-image: ${{ steps.calculate-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\n      - name: Test Pytorch binary\n        uses: ./pytorch/.github/actions/test-pytorch-binary\n        env:\n          DOCKER_IMAGE: ${{ steps.calculate-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\n      - name: Teardown XPU\n        uses: ./.github/actions/teardown-xpu\n    {%- else %}\n    runs-on: linux.rocm.gpu.mi250.1\n    timeout-minutes: !{{ common.timeout_minutes }}\n    !{{ upload.binary_env(config) }}\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    steps:\n      - name: Setup ROCm\n        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-rocm\n      - uses: !{{ common.download_artifact_action }}\n        name: Download Build Artifacts\n        with:\n          name: !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}\n          path: \"${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/\"\n      !{{ common.checkout(deep_clone=False, directory=\"pytorch\", checkout_pr_head=False) }}\n      - name: ROCm set GPU_FLAG\n        run: |\n          echo \"GPU_FLAG=--device=/dev/mem --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add video --group-add daemon\" >> \"${GITHUB_ENV}\"\n      - name: configure aws credentials\n        id: aws_creds\n        if: ${{ startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/ciflow/') }}\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::308535385114:role/gha_workflow_s3_and_ecr_read_only\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n          role-duration-seconds: 18000\n      - name: Calculate docker image\n        id: calculate-docker-image\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/calculate-docker-image@release/2.10\n        with:\n          docker-registry: ${{ startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/ciflow/') && '308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com' || 'docker.io' }}\n          docker-image-name: !{{ config[\"container_image\"] }}\n          custom-tag-prefix: !{{ config[\"container_image_tag_prefix\"] }}\n          docker-build-dir: .ci/docker\n          working-directory: pytorch\n      - name: Pull Docker image\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/pull-docker-image@release/2.10\n        with:\n          docker-image: ${{ steps.calculate-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\n      - name: Test Pytorch binary\n        uses: ./pytorch/.github/actions/test-pytorch-binary\n        env:\n          DOCKER_IMAGE: ${{ steps.calculate-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\n      - name: Teardown ROCm\n        uses: ./.github/actions/teardown-rocm\n    {%- endif %}\n\n{%- if branches == \"nightly\" %}\n  !{{ upload.upload_binaries(config) }}\n{%- endif %}\n{% endfor %}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/templates/linux_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/templates/linux_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2"
45. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "{% import 'common.yml.j2' as common %}\n{% import 'upload.yml.j2' as upload %}\n\n{%- block name -%}\n# Template is at:    .github/templates/macos_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2\n# Generation script: .github/scripts/generate_ci_workflows.py\nname: !{{ build_environment }}\n{%- endblock %}\n\n{%- macro set_runner_specific_vars() -%}\n      # NOTE: These environment variables are put here so that they can be applied on every job equally\n      #       They are also here because setting them at a workflow level doesn't give us access to the\n      #       runner.temp variable, which we need.\n      - name: Populate binary env\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          # shellcheck disable=SC2129\n          echo \"BINARY_ENV_FILE=${RUNNER_TEMP}/env\" >> \"${GITHUB_ENV}\"\n          # shellcheck disable=SC2129\n          echo \"PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR=${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts\" >> \"${GITHUB_ENV}\"\n          # shellcheck disable=SC2129\n          echo \"MAC_PACKAGE_WORK_DIR=${RUNNER_TEMP}\" >> \"${GITHUB_ENV}\"\n{%- endmacro %}\n\n{%- macro setup_python(py_ver) -%}\n      - name: Setup Python\n        uses: actions/setup-python@v6\n        with:\n          # .4 version is min minor for 3.10, and also no-gil version of 3.13 needs at least 3.13.3\n          python-version: \"!{{ py_ver.strip('t') + ('.4' if '3.14' not in py_ver else '.0') }}\"\n          freethreaded: !{{ \"true\" if py_ver.endswith('t') else \"false\" }}\n{%- endmacro %}\n\non:\n# TODO: Migrate to new ciflow trigger, reference https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/pull/70321\n  push:\n    # NOTE: Meta Employees can trigger new nightlies using: https://fburl.com/trigger_pytorch_nightly_build\n    branches:\n      - nightly\n    tags:\n      # NOTE: Binary build pipelines should only get triggered on release candidate builds\n      # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\n{%- for label in ciflow_config.labels | sort %}\n    {%- if loop.first and branches != \"nightly\" %}\n    tags:\n    {%- endif %}\n      - '!{{ label }}/*'\n{%- endfor %}\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\nenv:\n  ALPINE_IMAGE: \"308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/tool/alpine\"\n  AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1\n  BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: !{{ build_environment }}\n  GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n  PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}\n  SKIP_ALL_TESTS: 0\n!{{ common.concurrency(build_environment) }}\n\njobs:\n{%- for config in build_configs %}\n  !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}-build:\n    if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    runs-on: !{{ macos_runner }}\n    timeout-minutes: !{{ common.timeout_minutes }}\n    !{{ upload.binary_env(config, true) }}\n    {%- if config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements is defined and config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements|d('')|length > 0  %}\n      PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS: !{{ config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements }}\n    {%- endif %}\n    steps:\n      !{{ set_runner_specific_vars() }}\n      !{{ setup_python(config.get(\"python_version\", \"3.10\")) }}\n      !{{ common.checkout(deep_clone=False, directory=\"pytorch\", checkout_pr_head=False) }}\n      - name: Populate binary env\n        run: |\n          \"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_populate_env.sh\"\n      - name: Build PyTorch binary\n        run: |\n          set -eux -o pipefail\n          # shellcheck disable=SC1090\n          source \"${BINARY_ENV_FILE:-/Users/distiller/project/env}\"\n          mkdir -p \"$PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR\"\n\n          # Build\n          USE_PYTORCH_METAL_EXPORT=1\n          USE_COREML_DELEGATE=1\n          TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME=\"${TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME//-/_}\"\n          export USE_PYTORCH_METAL_EXPORT\n          export USE_COREML_DELEGATE\n          export TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME\n          \"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.ci/wheel/build_wheel.sh\"\n{%- if config[\"package_type\"] == \"wheel\" %}\n      - name: Test PyTorch wheel\n        run: |\n          set -eux -o pipefail\n          # shellcheck disable=SC1090\n          source \"${BINARY_ENV_FILE:-/Users/distiller/project/env}\"\n          pip uninstall -y \"$TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME\" || true\n          pip uninstall -y \"$TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME\" || true\n\n          # Create new \"clean\" conda environment for testing\n\n          SMOKE_TEST_PARAMS=\"\"\n\n          # shellcheck disable=SC2086\n          python -mvenv test_venv\n          source test_venv/bin/activate\n          pip install \"$PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR\"/*.whl numpy -v\n\n          # shellcheck disable=SC2086\n          python \"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.ci/pytorch/smoke_test/smoke_test.py\" --package torchonly ${SMOKE_TEST_PARAMS}\n{%- endif %}\n      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4.4.0\n        if: always()\n        with:\n          name: !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}\n          retention-days: 14\n          if-no-files-found: error\n          path: \"${{ env.PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR }}\"\n  !{{ upload.upload_binaries(config, has_test=False, use_s3=False) }}\n{%- endfor %}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/templates/macos_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/templates/macos_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2"
46. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "{% import 'common.yml.j2' as common %}\n{% import 'upload.yml.j2' as upload %}\n\n{%- block name -%}\n# Template is at:    .github/templates/windows_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2\n# Generation script: .github/scripts/generate_ci_workflows.py\nname: !{{ build_environment }}\n{%- endblock %}\n\n{%- macro set_runner_specific_vars() -%}\n      # NOTE: These environment variables are put here so that they can be applied on every job equally\n      #       They are also here because setting them at a workflow level doesn't give us access to the\n      #       runner.temp variable, which we need.\n      - name: Populate binary env\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          echo \"BINARY_ENV_FILE=${RUNNER_TEMP}/env\" >> \"${GITHUB_ENV}\"\n          echo \"PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR=${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts\" >> \"${GITHUB_ENV}\"\n          echo \"WIN_PACKAGE_WORK_DIR=${RUNNER_TEMP}\"\n{%- endmacro %}\n\non:\n  push:\n    {%- if branches == \"nightly\" %}\n    # NOTE: Meta Employees can trigger new nightlies using: https://fburl.com/trigger_pytorch_nightly_build\n    {%- endif %}\n    branches:\n      - !{{ branches }}\n    {%- if branches == \"nightly\" %}\n    tags:\n      # NOTE: Binary build pipelines should only get triggered on release candidate builds\n      # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\n    {%- endif %}\n{%- for label in ciflow_config.labels | sort %}\n    {%- if loop.first and branches != \"nightly\" %}\n    tags:\n    {%- endif %}\n      - '!{{ label }}/*'\n{%- endfor %}\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\nenv:\n  # Needed for conda builds\n  ALPINE_IMAGE: \"308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/tool/alpine\"\n  AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1\n  BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: !{{ build_environment }}\n  GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n  PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}\n  SHA1: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha || github.sha }}\n  SKIP_ALL_TESTS: 1\n  OS: !{{ os }}\n{%- if os == \"windows-arm64\" %}\n  PYTORCH_ROOT: /pytorch\n  DOWNLOADS_DIR: c:\\temp\\downloads\n  DEPENDENCIES_DIR: c:\\temp\\dependencies\n  ENABLE_APL: 1\n  ENABLE_OPENBLAS: 0\n  MSVC_VERSION : 14.42\n{%- endif %}\n!{{ common.concurrency(build_environment) }}\n\njobs:\n  get-label-type:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n{%- for config in build_configs %}\n  !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}-build:\n    if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    needs: get-label-type\n    {%- if os == \"windows-arm64\" %}\n    runs-on: \"windows-11-arm64-preview\"\n    {%- else %}\n    {%- if branches == \"nightly\" %}\n    runs-on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.12xlarge\"\n    {%- else %}\n    runs-on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.12xlarge.nonephemeral\"\n    {%- endif %}\n    {%- endif %}\n    timeout-minutes: !{{ common.timeout_minutes_windows_binary }}\n    !{{ upload.binary_env(config, True) }}\n    {%- if config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements is defined and config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements|d('')|length > 0  %}\n      PYTORCH_EXTRA_INSTALL_REQUIREMENTS: !{{ config.pytorch_extra_install_requirements }}\n    {%- endif %}\n    steps:\n{%- if os == \"windows-arm64\" %}\n      - name: Populate binary env\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          echo BINARY_ENV_FILE=%RUNNER_TEMP%/env>> %GITHUB_ENV%\n          echo PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR=%RUNNER_TEMP%/artifacts>> %GITHUB_ENV%\n          echo WIN_PACKAGE_WORK_DIR=%RUNNER_TEMP%>> %GITHUB_ENV%\n      - name: Bootstrap folders\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          mkdir \"%NIGHTLIES_PYTORCH_ROOT%\"\n          mkdir \"%PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR%\"\n      - name: Enable long paths\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          git config --system --get core.longpaths || echo \"core.longpaths is not set, setting it now\"\n          git config --system core.longpaths true\n      - name: Git checkout PyTorch\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n          path: \"pytorch\"\n          submodules: recursive\n      - name: Bootstrap Python\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          \"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_python.bat\"\n      - name: Bootstrap APL\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          \"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_apl.bat\"\n      - name: Bootstrap Rust\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          \"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_rust.bat\"\n      - name: Bootstrap sccache\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          \"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_sccache.bat\"\n      - name: Bootstrap Libuv\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          \"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_libuv.bat\"\n{%- else %}\n      !{{ set_runner_specific_vars() }}\n      !{{ common.setup_ec2_windows() }}\n      !{{ common.checkout(deep_clone=False, directory=\"pytorch\", checkout_pr_head=False) }}\n{%- endif %}\n      - name: Populate binary env\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          \"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_populate_env.sh\"\n      - name: Build PyTorch binary\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          \"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_windows_build.sh\"\n      - uses: !{{ common.upload_artifact_action }}\n        if: always()\n        with:\n          name: !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}\n          retention-days: 14\n          if-no-files-found: error\n          path: \"${{ env.PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR }}\"\n{%- if os != \"windows-arm64\" %}\n      !{{ common.wait_and_kill_ssh_windows('pytorch') }}\n{% endif %}\n  !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}-test:  # Testing\n    if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    needs:\n      - !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}-build\n      - get-label-type\n{%- if os == \"windows-arm64\" %}\n    runs-on: \"windows-11-arm64-preview\"\n{%- else %}\n{%- if config[\"gpu_arch_type\"] == \"cuda\" %}\n{%- if branches == \"nightly\" %}\n    runs-on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.g4dn.xlarge\"\n{%- else %}\n    runs-on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.g4dn.xlarge.nonephemeral\"\n{%- endif %}\n{%- else %}\n{%- if branches == \"nightly\" %}\n    runs-on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.4xlarge\"\n{%- else %}\n    runs-on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.4xlarge.nonephemeral\"\n{%- endif %}\n{%- endif %}\n{%- endif %}\n    timeout-minutes: !{{ common.timeout_minutes_windows_binary }}\n    !{{ upload.binary_env(config, True) }}\n    steps:\n{%- if os == \"windows-arm64\" %}\n      - name: Populate binary env\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          echo BINARY_ENV_FILE=%RUNNER_TEMP%/env>> %GITHUB_ENV%\n          echo PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR=%RUNNER_TEMP%/artifacts>> %GITHUB_ENV%\n          echo WIN_PACKAGE_WORK_DIR=%RUNNER_TEMP%>> %GITHUB_ENV%\n      - name: Enable long paths\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          git config --system --get core.longpaths || echo \"core.longpaths is not set, setting it now\"\n          git config --system core.longpaths true\n      - name: Git checkout PyTorch\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n          path: \"pytorch\"\n          submodules: recursive\n      - name: Bootstrap APL\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          \"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_apl.bat\"\n      - name: Bootstrap Python\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          \"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_python.bat\"\n      - name: Bootstrap Rust\n        shell: cmd\n        run: |\n          \"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_rust.bat\"\n{%- else %}\n      !{{ common.setup_ec2_windows() }}\n      !{{ common.checkout(deep_clone=False, directory=\"pytorch\", checkout_pr_head=False) }}\n      !{{ set_runner_specific_vars() }}\n{%- endif %}\n      - uses: !{{ common.download_artifact_action }}\n        name: Download Build Artifacts\n        with:\n          name: !{{ config[\"build_name\"] }}\n          path: \"${{ env.PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR }}\"\n      - name: Populate binary env\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          \"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_populate_env.sh\"\n      - name: Test PyTorch binary\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          \"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_windows_test.sh\"\n{%- if os != \"windows-arm64\" %}\n      !{{ common.wait_and_kill_ssh_windows('pytorch') }}\n{%- endif %}\n  {%- if branches == \"nightly\" %}\n  !{{ upload.upload_binaries(config, True) }}\n  {%- endif %}\n{%- endfor %}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/templates/windows_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/templates/windows_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2"

remaining files: {len(workflow_files)}\")\nEOFPYTHON\n\npython3 /tmp/fetch_and_write_workflows.py | head -30\n",

48. bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/batch_fetch.sh << 'EOFBASH'\n#!/bin/bash\n\n# This script will generate fetch commands for all remaining workflow files\n# We'll fetch them in parallel batches of up to 3 at a time\n\nREPO=\"github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78\"\nOUTPUT_DIR=\"/workspace\"\n\nfiles=(\n\".github/workflows/_bazel-build-test.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_binary-build-linux.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_binary-test-linux.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_binary-upload.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_docs.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_link_check.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_linux-test-stable-fa3.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_mac-build.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_mac-test.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_rocm-test.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_win-build.yml\"\n\".github/workflows/_win-test.yml\"\n)\n\necho \"#!/bin/bash\" > /tmp/fetch_batch_1.sh\necho \"# Batch 1: Files 1-15\" >> /tmp/fetch_batch_1.sh\necho \"\" >> /tmp/fetch_batch_1.sh\n\nfor file in \"${files[@]}\"; do\n    output_file=\"$OUTPUT_DIR/$file\"\n    mkdir -p \"$(dirname \"$output_file\")\"\n    echo \"# Fetching: $file\" >> /tmp/fetch_batch_1.sh\ndone\n\nchmod +x /tmp/fetch_batch_1.sh\n\necho \"Created fetch script: /tmp/fetch_batch_1.sh\"\necho \"Will fetch ${#files[@]} files in this batch\"\n\nEOFBASH\n\nchmod +x /tmp/batch_fetch.sh\nbash /tmp/batch_fetch.sh\n",
  "description": "Prepare batch fetch script"
}
Output
"Error: No such tool available: bash"
