v4.1.7\\n214:         with:\\n215:           # Download all available artifacts\\n216:           path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts-all\\n217: \\n218:       - name: Select Wheel Artifacts\\n219:         shell: bash\\n220:         run: |\\n221:           set -eux\\n222:           mkdir -p \\\"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\\\"\\n223:           mv \\\"${RUNNER_TEMP}\\\"/artifacts-all/vllm-wheel-\\\"${BUILD_DEVICE}\\\"-\\\"${PLATFORM}\\\"-*/* \\\"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\\\"\\n224: \\n225:       - name: Set DRY_RUN\\n226:         if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && (github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v'))) || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\\n227:         shell: bash\\n228:         run: |\\n229:           echo \\\"DRY_RUN=disabled\\\" >> \\\"$GITHUB_ENV\\\"\\n230: \\n231:       - name: Set UPLOAD_CHANNEL\\n232:         if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v') }}\\n233:         shell: bash\\n234:         run: |\\n235:           set -ex\\n236: \\n237:           if [[ \\\"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\\\" = *-rc[0-9]* ]]; then\\n238:             echo \\\"UPLOAD_CHANNEL=test\\\" >> \\\"$GITHUB_ENV\\\"\\n239:           fi\\n240: \\n241:       - name: Upload binaries\\n242:         env:\\n243:           PACKAGE_TYPE: wheel\\n244:           UPLOAD_SUBFOLDER: ${{ env.BUILD_DEVICE }}\\n245:           PKG_DIR: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts\\n246:         shell: bash\\n247:         run: |\\n248:           set -ex\\n249:           bash .circleci/scripts/binary_upload.sh\\n250: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml\"}"
121. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "path": ".github/workflows/check-labels.yml",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78"
}
Output
"{\"content\":\"1: name: Check Labels\\n2: \\n3: on:\\n4:   # We need pull_request_target to be able to post comments on PRs from forks.\\n5:   # Only allow pull_request_target when merging to main, not some historical branch.\\n6:   #\\n7:   # Make sure to don't introduce explicit checking out and installing/running\\n8:   # untrusted user code into this workflow!\\n9:   pull_request_target:\\n10:     types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, labeled, unlabeled]\\n11:     branches: [main]\\n12: \\n13:   # To check labels on ghstack PRs.\\n14:   # Note: as pull_request doesn't trigger on PRs targeting main,\\n15:   # to test changes to the workflow itself one needs to create\\n16:   # a PR that targets a gh/**/base branch.\\n17:   pull_request:\\n18:     types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, labeled, unlabeled]\\n19:     branches: [gh/**/base]\\n20: \\n21:   workflow_dispatch:\\n22:     inputs:\\n23:       pr_number:\\n24:         description: 'PR number to check labels for'\\n25:         required: true\\n26: \\n27: concurrency:\\n28:   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\\n29:   cancel-in-progress: true\\n30: \\n31: jobs:\\n32:   check-labels:\\n33:     permissions:\\n34:       contents: read\\n35:       pull-requests: write\\n36:     name: Check labels\\n37:     if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\\n38:     runs-on: linux.24_04.4x\\n39:     steps:\\n40:       - name: Checkout PyTorch\\n41:         uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\\n42:         with:\\n43:           submodules: false\\n44:           fetch-depth: 1\\n45: \\n46:       - name: Setup Python\\n47:         uses: actions/setup-python@a26af69be951a213d495a4c3e4e4022e16d87065 # v5.6.0\\n48:         with:\\n49:           python-version: '3.10'\\n50:           architecture: x64\\n51:           check-latest: false\\n52:           cache: pip\\n53:           cache-dependency-path: |\\n54:             **/.github/requirements-gha-cache.txt\\n55: \\n56:       - name: Install requirements\\n57:         id: requirements\\n58:         run: |\\n59:           pip install -r .github/requirements-gha-cache.txt --user\\n60: \\n61:       - name: Check labels\\n62:         env:\\n63:           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\\n64:           PR_NUM: ${{ github.event.number || github.event.inputs.pr_number }}\\n65:         run: |\\n66:           set -ex\\n67:           python3 .github/scripts/check_labels.py --exit-non-zero \\\"${PR_NUM}\\\"\\n68: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/workflows/check-labels.yml\"}"
122. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "path": ".github/workflows/close-nonexistent-disable-issues.yml",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78"
}
Output
"{\"content\":\"1: name: Close nonexistent disable issues\\n2: \\n3: on:\\n4:   schedule:\\n5:     - cron: 5 22 * * 5  # this should be about 3PM PT on Friday\\n6: \\n7: jobs:\\n8:   close-nonexistent-disable-issues:\\n9:     environment: rockset-read-only\\n10:     permissions:\\n11:       issues: write\\n12:     if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\\n13:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest\\n14:     steps:\\n15:       - name: Checkout PyTorch\\n16:         uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\\n17:         with:\\n18:           submodules: false\\n19:           fetch-depth: 1\\n20: \\n21:       - name: Run close_nonexistent_disable_issues.py\\n22:         env:\\n23:           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\\n24:           CLICKHOUSE_ENDPOINT: ${{ secrets.CLICKHOUSE_ENDPOINT }}\\n25:           CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.CLICKHOUSE_READONLY_USERNAME }}\\n26:           CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.CLICKHOUSE_READONLY_PASSWORD }}\\n27:         run: |\\n28:           pip3 install requests==2.32.2\\n29:           pip3 install clickhouse-connect==0.8.14\\n30:           python3 .github/scripts/close_nonexistent_disable_issues.py\\n31: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/workflows/close-nonexistent-disable-issues.yml\"}"
123. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "path": ".github/workflows/create_release.yml",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78"
}
Output
"{\"content\":\"1: name: Create Release\\n2: \\n3: on:\\n4:   push:\\n5:     branches:\\n6:       - main\\n7:       - release/*\\n8:     tags:\\n9:       # Final Release tags look like: v1.11.0\\n10:       - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+\\n11:       # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\\n12:       - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\\n13:   release:\\n14:     types: [published]\\n15:   pull_request:\\n16:     paths: [.github/workflows/create_release.yml]\\n17: \\n18: jobs:\\n19:   get-label-type:\\n20:     if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\\n21:     name: get-label-type\\n22:     uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\\n23:     with:\\n24:       triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\\n25:       issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\\n26:       curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\\n27:       curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\\n28: \\n29:   release:\\n30:     if: ${{ github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch' }}\\n31:     name: Create Release\\n32:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest\\n33:     # https://github.com/softprops/action-gh-release?tab=readme-ov-file#permissions\\n34:     permissions:\\n35:       contents: write\\n36:     outputs:\\n37:       pt_release_name: ${{ steps.release_name.outputs.pt_release_name }}\\n38:       pt_pep517_release_name: ${{ steps.release_name.outputs.pt_pep517_release_name }}\\n39:     steps:\\n40:       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2\\n41:         with:\\n42:           show-progress: false\\n43:           submodules: 'recursive'\\n44:           ref: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.head.sha || github.sha }}\\n45:       - name: Fake name for PRs\\n46:         if: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}\\n47:         run: echo \\\"PT_GITHUB_REF=refs/tags/pr-tag\\\" >> \\\"$GITHUB_ENV\\\"\\n48:       - name: Real name for non-PRs\\n49:         if: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' }}\\n50:         run: echo \\\"PT_GITHUB_REF=$GITHUB_REF\\\" >> \\\"$GITHUB_ENV\\\"\\n51:       - name: Set filenames\\n52:         run: |\\n53:           tag_or_branch=\\\"${PT_GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}\\\"\\n54:           tag_or_branch=\\\"${tag_or_branch#refs/heads/}\\\"\\n55:           # replace directory separators with _ in branch name\\n56:           tag_or_branch=\\\"${tag_or_branch//\\\\//_}\\\"\\n57:           torch_version=\\\"$(python -c 'from tools.generate_torch_version import get_torch_version; print(get_torch_version())')\\\"\\n58:           {\\n59:             echo \\\"PT_RELEASE_NAME=pytorch-$tag_or_branch\\\";\\n60:             echo \\\"PT_RELEASE_FILE=pytorch-$tag_or_branch.tar.gz\\\";\\n61:             echo \\\"PT_PEP517_RELEASE_FILE=torch-${torch_version}.tar.gz\\\";\\n62:           } >> \\\"$GITHUB_ENV\\\"\\n63:       - name: Checkout optional submodules\\n64:         run: python3 tools/optional_submodules.py\\n65:       - name: Copy docs requirements for inclusion\\n66:         run: |\\n67:           # Replace symlink with actual file\\n68:           rm docs/requirements.txt || true\\n69:           cp .ci/docker/requirements-docs.txt docs/requirements.txt\\n70:       - name: Create source distribution\\n71:         run: |\\n72:           # Create new folder with specified name so extracting the archive yields that\\n73:           rm -rf \\\"/tmp/$PT_RELEASE_NAME\\\"\\n74:           cp -r \\\"$PWD\\\" \\\"/tmp/$PT_RELEASE_NAME\\\"\\n75:           mv \\\"/tmp/$PT_RELEASE_NAME\\\" .\\n76:           # Cleanup\\n77:           rm -rf \\\"$PT_RELEASE_NAME\\\"/{.circleci,.ci}\\n78:           find \\\"$PT_RELEASE_NAME\\\" -name '.git*' -exec rm -rv {} \\\\; || true\\n79:           # Create archive\\n80:           tar -czf \\\"$PT_RELEASE_FILE\\\" \\\"$PT_RELEASE_NAME\\\"\\n81:           echo \\\"Created source archive $PT_RELEASE_FILE with content: $(ls -a \\\"$PT_RELEASE_NAME\\\")\\\"\\n82:       - name: Create PEP 517 compatible source distribution\\n83:         run: |\\n84:           pip install build==1.2.2.post1 || exit 1\\n85:           python -m build --sdist || exit 1\\n86:           cd dist || exit 1\\n87:       - name: Upload source distribution for release\\n88:         if: ${{ github.event_name == 'release' }}\\n89:         uses: softprops/action-gh-release@da05d552573ad5aba039eaac05058a918a7bf631 # v2.2.2\\n90:         with:\\n91:           files: |\\n92:             ${{ env.PT_RELEASE_FILE }}\\n93:             ${{ env.PT_PEP517_RELEASE_FILE }}\\n94:       - name: Upload source distribution to GHA artifacts  # for release tags\\n95:         if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && contains(github.ref, 'rc') }}\\n96:         uses: actions/upload-artifact@50769540e7f4bd5e21e526ee35c689e35e0d6874 # v4.4.0\\n97:         with:\\n98:           name: ${{ env.PT_RELEASE_FILE }}\\n99:           path: ${{ env.PT_RELEASE_FILE }}\\n100:       - name: Upload PEP 517 source distribution to GHA artifacts  # for release tags\\n101:         if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && contains(github.ref, 'rc') }}\\n102:         uses: actions/upload-artifact@50769540e7f4bd5e21e526ee35c689e35e0d6874 # v4.4.0\\n103:         with:\\n104:           name: ${{ env.PT_PEP517_RELEASE_FILE }}\\n105:           path: dist/${{ env.PT_PEP517_RELEASE_FILE }}\\n106:       - name: Set output\\n107:         id: release_name\\n108:         run: |\\n109:           {\\n110:             echo \\\"pt_release_name=${{ env.PT_RELEASE_FILE }}\\\";\\n111:             echo \\\"pt_pep517_release_name=${{ env.PT_PEP517_RELEASE_FILE }}\\\";\\n112:           } >> \\\"${GITHUB_OUTPUT}\\\"\\n113: \\n114:   upload_source_code_to_s3:\\n115:     if: ${{ github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch' && github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && contains(github.ref, 'rc') }}\\n116:     runs-on: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.2xlarge\\\"\\n117:     environment: sourcecode-upload\\n118:     name: Upload source code to S3 for release tags\\n119:     permissions:\\n120:       id-token: write\\n121:     needs:\\n122:       - get-label-type\\n123:       - release\\n124:     steps:\\n125:       - uses: actions/download-artifact@65a9edc5881444af0b9093a5e628f2fe47ea3b2e # v4.1.7\\n126:         with:\\n127:           name: ${{ needs.release.outputs.pt_release_name }}\\n128:       - uses: actions/download-artifact@65a9edc5881444af0b9093a5e628f2fe47ea3b2e # v4.1.7\\n129:         with:\\n130:           name: ${{ needs.release.outputs.pt_pep517_release_name }}\\n131:       - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account)\\n132:         uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\\n133:         with:\\n134:           role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_pytorch_source_code_upload_role\\n135:           aws-region: us-east-1\\n136:       - uses: seemethere/upload-artifact-s3@baba72d0712b404f646cebe0730933554ebce96a # v5.1.0\\n137:         with:\\n138:           s3-bucket: pytorch\\n139:           s3-prefix: source_code/test\\n140:           if-no-files-found: warn\\n141:           path: |\\n142:             ${{ needs.release.outputs.pt_release_name }}\\n143:             ${{ needs.release.outputs.pt_pep517_release_name }}\\n144: \\n145: concurrency:\\n146:   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name }}\\n147:   cancel-in-progress: true\\n148: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/workflows/create_release.yml\"}"
124. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "path": ".github/workflows/docker-builds.yml",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78"
}
Output
"{\"content\":\"1: name: docker-builds\\n2: \\n3: on:\\n4:   workflow_dispatch:\\n5:   pull_request:\\n6:     paths:\\n7:       - .ci/docker/**\\n8:       - .github/workflows/docker-builds.yml\\n9:       - .lintrunner.toml\\n10:   push:\\n11:     branches:\\n12:       - main\\n13:       - release/*\\n14:       - landchecks/*\\n15:     paths:\\n16:       - .ci/docker/**\\n17:       - .github/workflows/docker-builds.yml\\n18:       - .lintrunner.toml\\n19:   schedule:\\n20:     - cron: 1 3 * * 3\\n21: \\n22: concurrency:\\n23:   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\\n24:   cancel-in-progress: true\\n25: \\n26: env:\\n27:   ALPINE_IMAGE: 308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/tool/alpine\\n28:   AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1\\n29: \\n30: permissions: read-all\\n31: \\n32: jobs:\\n33:   get-label-type:\\n34:     if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\\n35:     name: get-label-type\\n36:     uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\\n37:     with:\\n38:       triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\\n39:       issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\\n40:       curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\\n41:       curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\\n42: \\n43:   docker-build:\\n44:     environment: ${{ (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) && 'docker-build' || '' }}\\n45:     needs: get-label-type\\n46:     timeout-minutes: 240\\n47:     strategy:\\n48:       fail-fast: false\\n49:       matrix:\\n50:         runner: [linux.12xlarge]\\n51:         docker-image-name: [\\n52:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3-gcc11,\\n53:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda13.0-cudnn9-py3-gcc11,\\n54:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3.12-gcc11-vllm,\\n55:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3-gcc11-inductor-benchmarks,\\n56:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda13.0-cudnn9-py3-gcc11-inductor-benchmarks,\\n57:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.4-cudnn9-py3-gcc11,\\n58:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.10-clang12,\\n59:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.11-clang12,\\n60:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.12-clang12,\\n61:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.13-clang12,\\n62:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.14-clang12,\\n63:           pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3,\\n64:           pytorch-linux-noble-rocm-n-py3,\\n65:           pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3-benchmarks,\\n66:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3.10-clang12,\\n67:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.10-gcc11,\\n68:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3-gcc11-inductor-benchmarks,\\n69:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.12-halide,\\n70:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.12-pallas,\\n71:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.12-pallas,\\n72:           pytorch-linux-jammy-xpu-n-1-py3,\\n73:           pytorch-linux-noble-xpu-n-py3,\\n74:           pytorch-linux-noble-xpu-n-py3-inductor-benchmarks,\\n75:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3-clang18-asan,\\n76:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3-clang12-onnx,\\n77:           pytorch-linux-jammy-linter,\\n78:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3.10-linter,\\n79:           # TODO: Re-enable me when docker pin update happens\\n80:           # pytorch-linux-jammy-py3-clang12-executorch,\\n81:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.12-triton-cpu,\\n82:           pytorch-linux-noble-riscv64-py3.12-gcc14\\n83:         ]\\n84:         include:\\n85:           - docker-image-name: pytorch-linux-jammy-aarch64-py3.10-gcc13\\n86:             runner: linux.arm64.m7g.4xlarge\\n87:           - docker-image-name: pytorch-linux-jammy-aarch64-py3.10-clang21\\n88:             runner: linux.arm64.m7g.4xlarge\\n89:           - docker-image-name: pytorch-linux-jammy-aarch64-py3.10-gcc13-inductor-benchmarks\\n90:             runner: linux.arm64.m7g.4xlarge\\n91:             timeout-minutes: 600\\n92:     # Docker uploads fail from LF runners, see https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/pull/137358\\n93:     # runs-on: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}${{ matrix.runner }}\\\"\\n94:     runs-on: \\\"${{ matrix.runner }}\\\"\\n95:     steps:\\n96:       - name: Clean workspace\\n97:         shell: bash\\n98:         run: |\\n99:           echo \\\"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}\\\"\\n100:           sudo rm -rf \\\"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}\\\"\\n101:           mkdir \\\"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}\\\"\\n102: \\n103:       # [see note: pytorch repo ref]\\n104:       # deep clone (fetch-depth 0) required for git merge-base\\n105:       - name: Checkout PyTorch\\n106:         uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\\n107: \\n108:       - name: Setup Linux\\n109:         uses: ./.github/actions/setup-linux\\n110: \\n111:       - name: Build docker image\\n112:         id: build-docker-image\\n113:         uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/calculate-docker-image@release/2.10\\n114:         with:\\n115:           docker-image-name: ci-image:${{ matrix.docker-image-name }}\\n116:           always-rebuild: true\\n117:           push: true\\n118: \\n119:       - name: Pull docker image\\n120:         uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/pull-docker-image@release/2.10\\n121:         with:\\n122:           docker-image: ${{ steps.build-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\\n123: \\n124:       - name: Generate output\\n125:         if: contains(matrix.docker-image-name, 'rocm')\\n126:         id: generate_output\\n127:         run: |\\n128:           docker_image_name=\\\"${{ matrix.docker-image-name }}\\\"\\n129:           docker_image_tag=\\\"${{ steps.build-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\\\"\\n130:           echo \\\"${docker_image_name}=${docker_image_tag}\\\" >> docker-builds-output-${docker_image_name}.txt\\n131: \\n132:       - name: Upload artifacts\\n133:         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4.4.0\\n134:         if: contains(matrix.docker-image-name, 'rocm')\\n135:         with:\\n136:           name: docker-builds-artifacts-${{ matrix.docker-image-name }}\\n137:           retention-days: 14\\n138:           path: ./docker-builds-output-${{ matrix.docker-image-name }}.txt\\n139: \\n140:       - uses: nick-fields/retry@7152eba30c6575329ac0576536151aca5a72780e # v3.0.0\\n141:         name: Push to https://ghcr.io/\\n142:         id: push-to-ghcr-io\\n143:         if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' }}\\n144:         env:\\n145:           ECR_DOCKER_IMAGE: ${{ steps.build-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\\n146:           GHCR_PAT: ${{ secrets.GHCR_PAT }}\\n147:         with:\\n148:           shell: bash\\n149:           timeout_minutes: 60\\n150:           max_attempts: 5\\n151:           retry_wait_seconds: 90\\n152:           command: |\\n153:             ghcr_image=\\\"ghcr.io/pytorch/ci-image\\\"\\n154:             tag=${ECR_DOCKER_IMAGE##*:}\\n155:             # Push docker image to the ghcr.io\\n156:             echo $GHCR_PAT | docker login ghcr.io -u pytorch --password-stdin\\n157:             docker tag \\\"${ECR_DOCKER_IMAGE}\\\" \\\"${ghcr_image}:${tag}\\\"\\n158:             docker push \\\"${ghcr_image}:${tag}\\\"\\n159: \\n160:       - name: Chown workspace\\n161:         uses: ./.github/actions/chown-workspace\\n162:         with:\\n163:           ALPINE_IMAGE: 308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/${{ contains(matrix.runner, 'arm64') && 'arm64v8' || 'tool' }}/alpine\\n164:         if: always()\\n165: \\n166:       - name: Teardown Linux\\n167:         uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/teardown-linux@release/2.10\\n168:         if: always()\\n169: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/workflows/docker-builds.yml\"}"
125. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "path": ".github/workflows/docker-cache-rocm.yml",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78"
}
Output
"{\"content\":\"1: name: docker-cache-rocm\\n2: \\n3: on:\\n4:   workflow_run:\\n5:     workflows: [docker-builds]\\n6:     branches: [main, release]\\n7:     types:\\n8:       - completed\\n9:   workflow_dispatch:\\n10:     inputs:\\n11:       branch:\\n12:         type: string\\n13:         description: Branch corresponding to the docker images being cached\\n14:         required: true\\n15:       run_id:\\n16:         type: string\\n17:         description: Workflow run id to pull artifacts from\\n18:         required: true\\n19: \\n20: concurrency:\\n21:   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.workflow_run.head_branch || github.event.inputs.branch }}\\n22:   cancel-in-progress: true\\n23: \\n24: permissions:\\n25:   id-token: write\\n26:   contents: read\\n27:   actions: read\\n28: \\n29: jobs:\\n30:   download-docker-builds-artifacts:\\n31:     if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\\n32:     name: download-docker-builds-artifacts\\n33:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest\\n34:     outputs:\\n35:       pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3: ${{ steps.process-artifacts.outputs.pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3 }}\\n36:       pytorch-linux-noble-rocm-n-py3: ${{ steps.process-artifacts.outputs.pytorch-linux-noble-rocm-n-py3 }}\\n37:       pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3-benchmarks: ${{ steps.process-artifacts.outputs.pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3-benchmarks }}\\n38:     steps:\\n39:       - name: Download artifacts\\n40:         uses: actions/download-artifact@65a9edc5881444af0b9093a5e628f2fe47ea3b2e #4.1.7\\n41:         with:\\n42:           run-id: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.id || github.event.inputs.run_id }}\\n43:           path: ./docker-builds-artifacts\\n44:           merge-multiple: true\\n45:           github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\\n46: \\n47:       - name: Process artifacts\\n48:         id: process-artifacts\\n49:         run: |\\n50:           ls -R ./docker-builds-artifacts\\n51:           cat ./docker-builds-artifacts/*txt >> \\\"${GITHUB_OUTPUT}\\\"\\n52:           cat \\\"${GITHUB_OUTPUT}\\\"\\n53: \\n54:   docker-cache:\\n55:     if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\\n56:     needs: download-docker-builds-artifacts\\n57:     strategy:\\n58:       fail-fast: false\\n59:       matrix:\\n60:         runner: [linux.rocm.gfx942.docker-cache, linux.rocm.mi250.docker-cache]\\n61:         docker-image: [\\n62:           \\\"${{ needs.download-docker-builds-artifacts.outputs.pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3 }}\\\",\\n63:           \\\"${{ needs.download-docker-builds-artifacts.outputs.pytorch-linux-noble-rocm-n-py3 }}\\\"\\n64:           #\\\"${{ needs.download-docker-builds-artifacts.outputs.pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3-benchmarks }}\\\"\\n65:         ]\\n66:     runs-on: \\\"${{ matrix.runner }}\\\"\\n67:     steps:\\n68:       - name: debug\\n69:         run: |\\n70:           JSON_STRINGIFIED=\\\"${{ toJSON(needs.download-docker-builds-artifacts.outputs) }}\\\"\\n71:           echo \\\"Outputs of download-docker-builds-artifacts job: ${JSON_STRINGIFIED}\\\"\\n72: \\n73:       - name: configure aws credentials\\n74:         id: aws_creds\\n75:         uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\\n76:         with:\\n77:           role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::308535385114:role/gha_workflow_s3_and_ecr_read_only\\n78:           aws-region: us-east-1\\n79:           role-duration-seconds: 18000\\n80: \\n81:       - name: Login to Amazon ECR\\n82:         id: login-ecr\\n83:         continue-on-error: false\\n84:         uses: aws-actions/amazon-ecr-login@062b18b96a7aff071d4dc91bc00c4c1a7945b076 # v2.0.1\\n85: \\n86:       - name: Generate ghrc.io tag\\n87:         id: ghcr-io-tag\\n88:         run: |\\n89:             ecr_image=\\\"${{ matrix.docker-image }}\\\"\\n90:             ghcr_image=\\\"ghcr.io/pytorch/ci-image:${ecr_image##*:}\\\"\\n91:             echo \\\"ghcr_image=${ghcr_image}\\\" >> \\\"$GITHUB_OUTPUT\\\"\\n92: \\n93:       - name: Pull docker image\\n94:         uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/pull-docker-image@release/2.10\\n95:         with:\\n96:           docker-image: ${{ steps.ghcr-io-tag.outputs.ghcr_image }}\\n97: \\n98:       - name: Save as tarball\\n99:         run: |\\n100:           docker_image_tag=${{ matrix.docker-image }}\\n101:           docker_image_tag=\\\"${docker_image_tag#*:}\\\" # Remove everything before and including first \\\":\\\"\\n102:           docker_image_tag=\\\"${docker_image_tag%-*}\\\" # Remove everything after and including last \\\"-\\\"\\n103:           ref_name=${{ github.event.workflow_run.head_branch || github.event.inputs.branch }}\\n104:           if [[ $ref_name =~ \\\"release/\\\" ]]; then\\n105:             ref_suffix=\\\"release\\\"\\n106:           elif [[ $ref_name == \\\"main\\\" ]]; then\\n107:             ref_suffix=\\\"main\\\"\\n108:           else\\n109:             echo \\\"Unexpected branch in ref_name: ${ref_name}\\\" && exit 1\\n110:           fi\\n111:           docker tag ${{ steps.ghcr-io-tag.outputs.ghcr_image }} ${{ matrix.docker-image }}\\n112:           # mv is atomic operation, so we use intermediate tar.tmp file to prevent read-write contention\\n113:           docker save -o ~/pytorch-data/docker/${docker_image_tag}.tar.tmp ${{ matrix.docker-image }}\\n114:           mv ~/pytorch-data/docker/${docker_image_tag}.tar.tmp ~/pytorch-data/docker/${docker_image_tag}_${ref_suffix}.tar\\n115: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/workflows/docker-cache-rocm.yml\"}"
126. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "name: Build libtorch docker images\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n      - release/*\n    tags:\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\n    paths:\n      - .ci/docker/**\n      - .github/workflows/build-libtorch-images.yml\n      - .github/actions/binary-docker-build/**\n  pull_request:\n    paths:\n      - .ci/docker/**\n      - .github/workflows/build-libtorch-images.yml\n      - .github/actions/binary-docker-build/**\n\nenv:\n  DOCKER_REGISTRY: \"docker.io\"\n  DOCKER_BUILDKIT: 1\n  WITH_PUSH: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) }}\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  get-label-type:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  build:\n    environment: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) && 'docker-build') || '' }}\n    needs: get-label-type\n    runs-on: ${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\n    name: libtorch-cxx11-builder:${{ matrix.tag }}\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        include: [\n          { tag: \"cuda13.0\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.9\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.8\" },\n          { tag: \"cuda12.6\" },\n          { tag: \"rocm7.0\"  },\n          { tag: \"rocm7.1\"  },\n          { tag: \"cpu\"      },\n        ]\n    steps:\n      - name: Build docker image\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/binary-docker-build@release/2.10\n        with:\n          docker-image-name: libtorch-cxx11-builder\n          custom-tag-prefix: ${{ matrix.tag }}\n          docker-build-dir: libtorch\n          DOCKER_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_TOKEN }}\n          DOCKER_ID: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_ID }}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-libtorch-images.yml"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/workflows/build-libtorch-images.yml"
127. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "name: Build manywheel docker images for s390x\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    tags:\n      - ciflow/s390/*\n    paths:\n      - .github/workflows/build-manywheel-images-s390x.yml\n\n\nenv:\n  DOCKER_REGISTRY: \"docker.io\"\n  DOCKER_BUILDKIT: 1\n  WITH_PUSH: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) }}\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  build-docker-cpu-s390x:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    environment: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) && 'docker-build') || '' }}\n    runs-on: linux.s390x\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout PyTorch\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\n        with:\n          submodules: false\n          no-sudo: true\n\n      - name: Build Docker Image\n        run: |\n          .ci/docker/manywheel/build.sh manylinuxs390x-builder:cpu-s390x -t manylinuxs390x-builder:cpu-s390x\n\n      - name: Tag and (if WITH_PUSH) push docker image to docker.io\n        env:\n          DOCKER_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_TOKEN }}\n          DOCKER_ID: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_ID }}\n          CREATED_FULL_DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME: manylinuxs390x-builder:cpu-s390x\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -euox pipefail\n          GITHUB_REF=\"${GITHUB_REF:-$(git symbolic-ref -q HEAD || git describe --tags --exact-match)}\"\n          GIT_BRANCH_NAME=\"${GITHUB_REF##*/}\"\n          GIT_COMMIT_SHA=\"${GITHUB_SHA:-$(git rev-parse HEAD)}\"\n          CI_FOLDER_SHA=\"$(git rev-parse HEAD:.ci/docker)\"\n\n          DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME_PREFIX=\"docker.io/pytorch/${CREATED_FULL_DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME}\"\n\n          docker tag \"${CREATED_FULL_DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME}\" \"${DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME_PREFIX}-${GIT_BRANCH_NAME}\"\n          docker tag \"${CREATED_FULL_DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME}\" \"${DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME_PREFIX}-${GIT_COMMIT_SHA}\"\n          docker tag \"${CREATED_FULL_DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME}\" \"${DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME_PREFIX}-${CI_FOLDER_SHA}\"\n\n          set +x\n          if [[ \"${WITH_PUSH:-false}\" == \"true\" ]]; then\n            echo \"${DOCKER_TOKEN}\" | docker login -u \"${DOCKER_ID}\" --password-stdin\n            docker push \"${DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME_PREFIX}-${GIT_BRANCH_NAME}\"\n            docker push \"${DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME_PREFIX}-${GIT_COMMIT_SHA}\"\n            docker push \"${DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME_PREFIX}-${CI_FOLDER_SHA}\"\n          fi\n\n      - name: Cleanup docker\n        if: cancelled()\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          docker system prune --build -f || true\n          sleep 60\n          docker system prune --build -f || true\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-manywheel-images-s390x.yml"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/workflows/build-manywheel-images-s390x.yml"
128. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "name: Build manywheel docker images\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n      - release/*\n    tags:\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\n    paths:\n      - .ci/docker/**\n      - .github/workflows/build-manywheel-images.yml\n      - .github/actions/binary-docker-build/**\n  pull_request:\n    paths:\n      - .ci/docker/**\n      - .github/workflows/build-manywheel-images.yml\n      - .github/actions/binary-docker-build/**\n\nenv:\n  DOCKER_REGISTRY: \"docker.io\"\n  DOCKER_BUILDKIT: 1\n  WITH_PUSH: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) }}\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  get-label-type:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  build:\n    environment: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release') || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) && 'docker-build') || '' }}\n    needs: get-label-type\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        include: [\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"cuda13.0\",          runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"cuda12.8\",          runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"cuda12.9\",          runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"cuda12.6\",          runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinuxaarch64-builder\",       tag: \"cuda13.0\",          runner: \"linux.arm64.2xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinuxaarch64-builder\",       tag: \"cuda12.9\",          runner: \"linux.arm64.2xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinuxaarch64-builder\",       tag: \"cuda12.8\",          runner: \"linux.arm64.2xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinuxaarch64-builder\",       tag: \"cuda12.6\",          runner: \"linux.arm64.2xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"rocm7.0\",           runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"rocm7.1\",           runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"cpu\",               runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28_aarch64-builder\",  tag: \"cpu-aarch64\",       runner: \"linux.arm64.2xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n          { name: \"manylinux2_28-builder\",          tag: \"xpu\",               runner: \"linux.9xlarge.ephemeral\" },\n        ]\n    runs-on: ${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}${{ matrix.runner }}\n    name: ${{ matrix.name }}:${{ matrix.tag }}\n    steps:\n      - name: Build docker image\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/binary-docker-build@release/2.10\n        with:\n          docker-image-name: ${{ matrix.name }}\n          custom-tag-prefix: ${{ matrix.tag }}\n          docker-build-dir: manywheel\n          DOCKER_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_TOKEN }}\n          DOCKER_ID: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_ID }}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-manywheel-images.yml"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/workflows/build-manywheel-images.yml"
129. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "name: Build Triton wheels\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - release/2.10\n    tags:\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\n      - 'ciflow/triton_binaries/*'\n    paths:\n      - .github/workflows/build-triton-wheel.yml\n      - .github/scripts/build_triton_wheel.py\n      - .github/ci_commit_pins/triton.txt\n      - .github/scripts/windows/install_vs2022.ps1\n      - .github/scripts/windows/build_triton.bat\n      - .ci/docker/ci_commit_pins/triton.txt\n      - .ci/docker/ci_commit_pins/triton-xpu.txt\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  pull_request:\n    paths:\n      - .github/workflows/build-triton-wheel.yml\n      - .github/scripts/build_triton_wheel.py\n      - .github/ci_commit_pins/triton.txt\n      - .github/scripts/windows/install_vs2022.ps1\n      - .github/scripts/windows/build_triton.bat\n      - .ci/docker/ci_commit_pins/triton.txt\n      - .ci/docker/ci_commit_pins/triton-xpu.txt\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  get-label-type:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  build-wheel:\n    name: \"Build Triton Wheel\"\n    needs: get-label-type\n    runs-on: ${{ matrix.runs_on }}\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        py_vers: [ \"3.10\", \"3.11\", \"3.12\", \"3.13\", \"3.13t\", \"3.14\", \"3.14t\" ]\n        device: [\"cuda\", \"rocm\", \"xpu\", \"aarch64\"]\n        docker-image: [\"pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cpu\"]\n        include:\n          - device: \"rocm\"\n            rocm_version: \"7.1\"\n            runs_on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.4xlarge\"\n          - device: \"cuda\"\n            rocm_version: \"\"\n            runs_on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.4xlarge\"\n          - device: \"xpu\"\n            rocm_version: \"\"\n            runs_on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.4xlarge\"\n          - device: \"aarch64\"\n            rocm_version: \"\"\n            runs_on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.arm64.2xlarge\"\n    timeout-minutes: 40\n    env:\n      DOCKER_IMAGE: ${{ matrix.device == 'rocm' && format('pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:rocm{0}', matrix.rocm_version) || matrix.device == 'aarch64' && 'pytorch/manylinux2_28_aarch64-builder:cpu-aarch64' || matrix.docker-image }}\n      PY_VERS: ${{ matrix.py_vers }}\n      BUILD_DEVICE: ${{ matrix.device }}\n      PLATFORM: 'manylinux_2_28_x86_64'\n    steps:\n      - name: Setup SSH (Click me for login details)\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/setup-ssh@release/2.10\n        with:\n          github-secret: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Checkout PyTorch\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\n        with:\n          submodules: false\n\n      - name: Setup Linux\n        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-linux\n\n      - name: Pull Docker image\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/pull-docker-image@release/2.10\n        with:\n          docker-image: ${{ env.DOCKER_IMAGE }}\n\n      - name: Build Triton wheel\n        env:\n          IS_RELEASE_TAG: ${{ startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v') }}\n        run: |\n          set -x\n          mkdir -p \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n          container_name=$(docker run \\\n            --tty \\\n            --detach \\\n            -v \"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}:/pytorch\" \\\n            -v \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts:/artifacts\" \\\n            -w /artifacts/ \\\n            \"${DOCKER_IMAGE}\"      \\\n          )\n\n          case $PY_VERS in\n          3.10)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp310-cp310/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.11)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp311-cp311/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.12)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp312-cp312/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.13)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp313-cp313/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.13t)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp313-cp313t/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.14)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp314-cp314/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.14t)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp314-cp314t/bin/python\n            ;;\n          *)\n            echo \"Unsupported python version ${PY_VERS}\"\n            exit 1\n            ;;\n          esac\n\n          RELEASE=\"\"\n          WITH_CLANG_LDD=\"\"\n          if [[ \"${IS_RELEASE_TAG}\" == true ]]; then\n            RELEASE=\"--release\"\n          fi\n\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" yum install -y zlib-devel zip\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" \"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\"  -m pip install -U setuptools==78.1.0 pybind11==3.0.1 auditwheel wheel\n          set +e\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" command -v pip\n          has_pip=$?\n          set -e\n          if [ $has_pip -eq 0 ] ; then\n              docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" pip install -U cmake --force-reinstall\n          else\n              docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" \"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\"  -m pip install -U cmake --force-reinstall\n          fi\n\n          if [[ (\\\"${{ matrix.device }}\\\" == \\\"cuda\\\" || \\\"${{ matrix.device }}\\\" == \\\"rocm\\\" || \\\"${{ matrix.device }}\\\" == \\\"aarch64\\\" ) ]]; then\n            docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" dnf install clang lld -y\n            WITH_CLANG_LDD=\"--with-clang-ldd\"\n          fi\n\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" bash -c \"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE} /pytorch/.github/scripts/build_triton_wheel.py --device=$BUILD_DEVICE $RELEASE $WITH_CLANG_LDD\"\n\n          if [[ (\\\"${{ matrix.device }}\\\" == \\\"cuda\\\" || \\\"${{ matrix.device }}\\\" == \\\"xpu\\\") ]]; then\n            docker exec -t \"${container_name}\"  bash -c \"auditwheel repair --plat ${PLATFORM} //artifacts/*.whl\"\n          else\n            docker exec -t \"${container_name}\"  bash -c \"mkdir //artifacts/wheelhouse\"\n            docker exec -t \"${container_name}\"  bash -c \"mv //artifacts/*.whl //artifacts/wheelhouse/\"\n          fi\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" chown -R 1000.1000 /artifacts/wheelhouse\n\n      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@50769540e7f4bd5e21e526ee35c689e35e0d6874 # v4.4.0\n        with:\n          name: triton-wheel-${{ matrix.py_vers }}-${{ matrix.device }}-${{ env.PLATFORM }}\n          if-no-files-found: error\n          path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/wheelhouse/*\n\n      - name: Teardown Linux\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/teardown-linux@release/2.10\n        if: always()\n\n  build-wheel-win:\n    name: \"Build Triton Windows Wheel\"\n    needs: get-label-type\n    runs-on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}windows.4xlarge\"\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        py_vers: [ \"3.10\", \"3.11\", \"3.12\", \"3.13\", \"3.13t\", \"3.14\", \"3.14t\" ]\n        device: [\"xpu\"]\n    timeout-minutes: 40\n    env:\n      PY_VERS: ${{ matrix.py_vers }}\n      BUILD_DEVICE: ${{ matrix.device }}\n      VC_INSTALL_PATH: \"C:\\\\\\\\MSVC-BuildTools-2022\"\n    steps:\n      - name: Display EC2 information\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -euo pipefail\n          function get_ec2_metadata() {\n            category=$1\n            curl -H \"X-aws-ec2-metadata-token: $(curl -s -X PUT \"http://169.254.169.254/latest/api/token\" -H \"X-aws-ec2-metadata-token-ttl-seconds: 30\")\" -fsSL \"http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/${category}\"\n          }\n          echo \"ami-id: $(get_ec2_metadata ami-id)\"\n          echo \"instance-id: $(get_ec2_metadata instance-id)\"\n          echo \"instance-type: $(get_ec2_metadata instance-type)\"\n          echo \"system info $(uname -a)\"\n      - name: \"[FB EMPLOYEES] Enable SSH (Click me for login details)\"\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/setup-ssh@release/2.10\n        continue-on-error: true\n        with:\n          github-secret: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n      - name: Enable git long paths and symlinks on Windows and disable fsmonitor daemon\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          git config --global core.longpaths true\n          git config --global core.symlinks true\n          git config --global core.fsmonitor false\n      - name: Checkout PyTorch\n        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2\n        with:\n          ref: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.head.sha || github.sha }}\n          submodules: false\n          path: pytorch\n          show-progress: false\n      - name: Clean PyTorch checkout\n        run: |\n          git clean -fxd\n        working-directory: pytorch\n      - name: Enable long paths on Windows and install VS2022 17.13.2\n        env:\n          VC_YEAR: 2022\n          VC_VERSION: 17.13.2\n        shell: bash\n        working-directory: pytorch\n        run: |\n          powershell .github/scripts/windows/install_vs2022.ps1\n      - name: Build Triton wheel\n        env:\n          IS_RELEASE_TAG: ${{ startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v') }}\n        working-directory: pytorch\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -x\n          export RELEASE=\"\"\n          if [[ \"${IS_RELEASE_TAG}\" == true ]]; then\n            export RELEASE=\"--release\"\n          fi\n          .github/scripts/windows/build_triton.bat\n          mkdir -p \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n          mv ./*.whl \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@50769540e7f4bd5e21e526ee35c689e35e0d6874 # v4.4.0\n        with:\n          name: triton-wheel-${{ matrix.py_vers }}-${{ matrix.device }}\n          if-no-files-found: error\n          path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/*\n\n\n  upload-wheel:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-22.04\n    needs:\n      - build-wheel\n      - build-wheel-win\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    container:\n      image: continuumio/miniconda3:4.12.0\n    environment: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main') && 'nightly-wheel-upload' || '' }}\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2\n\n      - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account) for main\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_workflow_nightly_build_wheels\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n\n      - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account) for RC builds\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' &&  (startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/') && !startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/ciflow/')) }}\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_workflow_test_build_wheels\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n\n      - name: Download Build Artifacts\n        uses: actions/download-artifact@65a9edc5881444af0b9093a5e628f2fe47ea3b2e # v4.1.7\n        with:\n          path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts-all\n\n      - name: Select Wheel Artifacts\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -x\n          mkdir -p \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n          mv \"${RUNNER_TEMP}\"/artifacts-all/triton-wheel-*/* \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n\n      - name: Set DRY_RUN (only for tagged pushes)\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && (github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v')) }}\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          echo \"DRY_RUN=disabled\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n\n      - name: Set UPLOAD_CHANNEL (only for tagged pushes)\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v') }}\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -ex\n\n          if [[ \"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\" = *-rc[0-9]* ]]; then\n            echo \"UPLOAD_CHANNEL=test\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n          fi\n\n      - name: Upload binaries\n        env:\n          PACKAGE_TYPE: wheel\n          UPLOAD_SUBFOLDER: \"\"\n          PKG_DIR: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -ex\n          bash .circleci/scripts/binary_upload.sh\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-triton-wheel.yml"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/workflows/build-triton-wheel.yml"
130. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "name: Build vLLM wheels\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n    paths:\n      - .github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml\n      - .github/ci_commit_pins/vllm.txt\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  pull_request:\n    paths:\n      - .github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml\n      - .github/ci_commit_pins/vllm.txt\n  schedule:\n    - cron: 30 13 * * *\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  build-wheel:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        python-version: [ '3.12' ]\n        platform: [ 'manylinux_2_28_x86_64', 'manylinux_2_28_aarch64' ]\n        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu129', 'cu130' ]\n        include:\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu129\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda12.9'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_x86_64\n            device: cu130\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda13.0'\n            runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu128\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.8'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu129\n            manylinux-image: 'pytorch/manylinuxaarch64-builder:cuda12.9'\n            runner: linux.arm64.r7g.12xlarge.memory\n        exclude:\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu130\n    name: \"Build ${{ matrix.device }} vLLM wheel on ${{ matrix.platform }}\"\n    runs-on: ${{ matrix.runner }}\n    timeout-minutes: 480\n    env:\n      PY_VERS: ${{ matrix.python-version }}\n      MANYLINUX_IMAGE: ${{ matrix.manylinux-image }}\n      PLATFORM: ${{ matrix.platform }}\n      BUILD_DEVICE: ${{ matrix.device }}\n    steps:\n      - name: Setup SSH (Click me for login details)\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/setup-ssh@release/2.10\n        with:\n          github-secret: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Checkout PyTorch\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\n        with:\n          submodules: false\n\n      - name: Setup Linux\n        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-linux\n\n      - name: Get latest PyTorch nightly\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n\n          case $PY_VERS in\n          3.10)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp310-cp310/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.11)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp311-cp311/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.12)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp312-cp312/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.13)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp313-cp313/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.13t)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp313-cp313t/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.14)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp314-cp314/bin/python\n            ;;\n          3.14t)\n            PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/opt/python/cp314-cp314t/bin/python\n            ;;\n          *)\n            echo \"Unsupported python version ${PY_VERS}\"\n            exit 1\n            ;;\n          esac\n\n          mkdir -p \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n\n          container_name=$(docker run \\\n            --tty \\\n            --detach \\\n            -e PLATFORM \\\n            -e PYTHON_EXECUTABLE=\"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" \\\n            -v \"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}:/pytorch\" \\\n            -v \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts:/artifacts\" \\\n            -w /artifacts/ \\\n            \"${MANYLINUX_IMAGE}\"\n          )\n\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" \"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" -mpip install \\\n            --pre torch torchvision torchaudio \\\n            --index-url \"https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/${BUILD_DEVICE}\"\n\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" \"${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE}\" -mpip download \\\n            --pre torch torchvision torchaudio \\\n            --index-url \"https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/${BUILD_DEVICE}\"\n\n          echo \"container_name=${container_name}\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n\n      - name: Build vLLM wheel\n        uses: ./.github/actions/build-external-packages\n        with:\n          build-targets: vllm\n          docker-image: ${{ env.MANYLINUX_IMAGE }}\n          cuda-arch-list: '8.0;8.9;9.0;10.0;12.0'\n          torch-wheel-dir: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts\n          output-dir: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/externals\n\n      - name: Prepare vLLM wheel\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" bash -c /pytorch/.github/scripts/prepare_vllm_wheels.sh\n          docker exec -t \"${container_name}\" chown -R 1000:1000 /artifacts\n\n      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@50769540e7f4bd5e21e526ee35c689e35e0d6874 # v4.4.0\n        with:\n          name: vllm-wheel-${{ matrix.device }}-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.python-version }}\n          if-no-files-found: error\n          path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts/externals/vllm/wheels/*.whl\n\n      - name: Teardown Linux\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/teardown-linux@release/2.10\n        if: always()\n\n  upload-wheel:\n    name: \"Upload ${{ matrix.device }} vLLM wheel on ${{ matrix.platform }}\"\n    needs:\n      - build-wheel\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        platform: [ 'manylinux_2_28_x86_64', 'manylinux_2_28_aarch64' ]\n        device: [ 'cu128', 'cu129', 'cu130' ]\n        exclude:\n          - platform: manylinux_2_28_aarch64\n            device: cu130\n    env:\n      PLATFORM: ${{ matrix.platform }}\n      BUILD_DEVICE: ${{ matrix.device }}\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    container:\n      image: continuumio/miniconda3:4.12.0\n    environment: ${{ ((github.event_name == 'push' && github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main') || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch') && 'nightly-wheel-upload' || '' }}\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2\n\n      - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account) for main\n        if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main') || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_workflow_nightly_build_wheels\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n\n      - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account) for RC builds\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' &&  (startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/') && !startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/ciflow/')) }}\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_workflow_test_build_wheels\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n\n      - name: Download Build Artifacts\n        uses: actions/download-artifact@65a9edc5881444af0b9093a5e628f2fe47ea3b2e # v4.1.7\n        with:\n          path: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts-all\n\n      - name: Select Wheel Artifacts\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -eux\n          mkdir -p \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n          mv \"${RUNNER_TEMP}\"/artifacts-all/vllm-wheel-\"${BUILD_DEVICE}\"-\"${PLATFORM}\"-*/* \"${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts/\"\n\n      - name: Set DRY_RUN\n        if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'push' && (github.event.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v'))) || github.event_name == 'schedule' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          echo \"DRY_RUN=disabled\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n\n      - name: Set UPLOAD_CHANNEL\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.event.ref, 'refs/tags/v') }}\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -ex\n\n          if [[ \"${GITHUB_REF_NAME}\" = *-rc[0-9]* ]]; then\n            echo \"UPLOAD_CHANNEL=test\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n          fi\n\n      - name: Upload binaries\n        env:\n          PACKAGE_TYPE: wheel\n          UPLOAD_SUBFOLDER: ${{ env.BUILD_DEVICE }}\n          PKG_DIR: ${{ runner.temp }}/artifacts\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          set -ex\n          bash .circleci/scripts/binary_upload.sh\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/workflows/build-vllm-wheel.yml"
131. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "name: Check Labels\n\non:\n  pull_request_target:\n    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, labeled, unlabeled]\n    branches: [main]\n\n  pull_request:\n    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, labeled, unlabeled]\n    branches: [gh/**/base]\n\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      pr_number:\n        description: 'PR number to check labels for'\n        required: true\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  check-labels:\n    permissions:\n      contents: read\n      pull-requests: write\n    name: Check labels\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    runs-on: linux.24_04.4x\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout PyTorch\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\n        with:\n          submodules: false\n          fetch-depth: 1\n\n      - name: Setup Python\n        uses: actions/setup-python@a26af69be951a213d495a4c3e4e4022e16d87065 # v5.6.0\n        with:\n          python-version: '3.10'\n          architecture: x64\n          check-latest: false\n          cache: pip\n          cache-dependency-path: |\n            **/.github/requirements-gha-cache.txt\n\n      - name: Install requirements\n        id: requirements\n        run: |\n          pip install -r .github/requirements-gha-cache.txt --user\n\n      - name: Check labels\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n          PR_NUM: ${{ github.event.number || github.event.inputs.pr_number }}\n        run: |\n          set -ex\n          python3 .github/scripts/check_labels.py --exit-non-zero \"${PR_NUM}\"\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/check-labels.yml"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/workflows/check-labels.yml"
132. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "name: Close nonexistent disable issues\n\non:\n  schedule:\n    - cron: 5 22 * * 5\n\njobs:\n  close-nonexistent-disable-issues:\n    environment: rockset-read-only\n    permissions:\n      issues: write\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Checkout PyTorch\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\n        with:\n          submodules: false\n          fetch-depth: 1\n\n      - name: Run close_nonexistent_disable_issues.py\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n          CLICKHOUSE_ENDPOINT: ${{ secrets.CLICKHOUSE_ENDPOINT }}\n          CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.CLICKHOUSE_READONLY_USERNAME }}\n          CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.CLICKHOUSE_READONLY_PASSWORD }}\n        run: |\n          pip3 install requests==2.32.2\n          pip3 install clickhouse-connect==0.8.14\n          python3 .github/scripts/close_nonexistent_disable_issues.py\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/close-nonexistent-disable-issues.yml"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/workflows/close-nonexistent-disable-issues.yml"
133. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "name: Create Release\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n      - release/*\n    tags:\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\n  release:\n    types: [published]\n  pull_request:\n    paths: [.github/workflows/create_release.yml]\n\njobs:\n  get-label-type:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  release:\n    if: ${{ github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch' }}\n    name: Create Release\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    permissions:\n      contents: write\n    outputs:\n      pt_release_name: ${{ steps.release_name.outputs.pt_release_name }}\n      pt_pep517_release_name: ${{ steps.release_name.outputs.pt_pep517_release_name }}\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2\n        with:\n          show-progress: false\n          submodules: 'recursive'\n          ref: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.head.sha || github.sha }}\n      - name: Fake name for PRs\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}\n        run: echo \"PT_GITHUB_REF=refs/tags/pr-tag\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n      - name: Real name for non-PRs\n        if: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' }}\n        run: echo \"PT_GITHUB_REF=$GITHUB_REF\" >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n      - name: Set filenames\n        run: |\n          tag_or_branch=\"${PT_GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}\"\n          tag_or_branch=\"${tag_or_branch#refs/heads/}\"\n          tag_or_branch=\"${tag_or_branch//\\//_}\"\n          torch_version=\"$(python -c 'from tools.generate_torch_version import get_torch_version; print(get_torch_version())')\"\n          {\n            echo \"PT_RELEASE_NAME=pytorch-$tag_or_branch\";\n            echo \"PT_RELEASE_FILE=pytorch-$tag_or_branch.tar.gz\";\n            echo \"PT_PEP517_RELEASE_FILE=torch-${torch_version}.tar.gz\";\n          } >> \"$GITHUB_ENV\"\n      - name: Checkout optional submodules\n        run: python3 tools/optional_submodules.py\n      - name: Copy docs requirements for inclusion\n        run: |\n          rm docs/requirements.txt || true\n          cp .ci/docker/requirements-docs.txt docs/requirements.txt\n      - name: Create source distribution\n        run: |\n          rm -rf \"/tmp/$PT_RELEASE_NAME\"\n          cp -r \"$PWD\" \"/tmp/$PT_RELEASE_NAME\"\n          mv \"/tmp/$PT_RELEASE_NAME\" .\n          rm -rf \"$PT_RELEASE_NAME\"/{.circleci,.ci}\n          find \"$PT_RELEASE_NAME\" -name '.git*' -exec rm -rv {} \\; || true\n          tar -czf \"$PT_RELEASE_FILE\" \"$PT_RELEASE_NAME\"\n          echo \"Created source archive $PT_RELEASE_FILE with content: $(ls -a \"$PT_RELEASE_NAME\")\"\n      - name: Create PEP 517 compatible source distribution\n        run: |\n          pip install build==1.2.2.post1 || exit 1\n          python -m build --sdist || exit 1\n          cd dist || exit 1\n      - name: Upload source distribution for release\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'release' }}\n        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@da05d552573ad5aba039eaac05058a918a7bf631 # v2.2.2\n        with:\n          files: |\n            ${{ env.PT_RELEASE_FILE }}\n            ${{ env.PT_PEP517_RELEASE_FILE }}\n      - name: Upload source distribution to GHA artifacts\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && contains(github.ref, 'rc') }}\n        uses: actions/upload-artifact@50769540e7f4bd5e21e526ee35c689e35e0d6874 # v4.4.0\n        with:\n          name: ${{ env.PT_RELEASE_FILE }}\n          path: ${{ env.PT_RELEASE_FILE }}\n      - name: Upload PEP 517 source distribution to GHA artifacts\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && contains(github.ref, 'rc') }}\n        uses: actions/upload-artifact@50769540e7f4bd5e21e526ee35c689e35e0d6874 # v4.4.0\n        with:\n          name: ${{ env.PT_PEP517_RELEASE_FILE }}\n          path: dist/${{ env.PT_PEP517_RELEASE_FILE }}\n      - name: Set output\n        id: release_name\n        run: |\n          {\n            echo \"pt_release_name=${{ env.PT_RELEASE_FILE }}\";\n            echo \"pt_pep517_release_name=${{ env.PT_PEP517_RELEASE_FILE }}\";\n          } >> \"${GITHUB_OUTPUT}\"\n\n  upload_source_code_to_s3:\n    if: ${{ github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch' && github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v') && contains(github.ref, 'rc') }}\n    runs-on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.2xlarge\"\n    environment: sourcecode-upload\n    name: Upload source code to S3 for release tags\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n    needs:\n      - get-label-type\n      - release\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/download-artifact@65a9edc5881444af0b9093a5e628f2fe47ea3b2e # v4.1.7\n        with:\n          name: ${{ needs.release.outputs.pt_release_name }}\n      - uses: actions/download-artifact@65a9edc5881444af0b9093a5e628f2fe47ea3b2e # v4.1.7\n        with:\n          name: ${{ needs.release.outputs.pt_pep517_release_name }}\n      - name: Configure AWS credentials(PyTorch account)\n        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0\n        with:\n          role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::749337293305:role/gha_pytorch_source_code_upload_role\n          aws-region: us-east-1\n      - uses: seemethere/upload-artifact-s3@baba72d0712b404f646cebe0730933554ebce96a # v5.1.0\n        with:\n          s3-bucket: pytorch\n          s3-prefix: source_code/test\n          if-no-files-found: warn\n          path: |\n            ${{ needs.release.outputs.pt_release_name }}\n            ${{ needs.release.outputs.pt_pep517_release_name }}\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/.github/workflows/create_release.yml"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/.github/workflows/create_release.yml"

"{\"content\":\"1: name: docker-builds\\n2: \\n3: on:\\n4:   workflow_dispatch:\\n5:   pull_request:\\n6:     paths:\\n7:       - .ci/docker/**\\n8:       - .github/workflows/docker-builds.yml\\n9: .github/workflows/docker-builds.yml\\n18:       - .lintrunner.toml\\n19:   schedule:\\n20:     - cron: 1 3 * * 3\\n21: \\n22: concurrency:\\n23:   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\\n24:   cancel-in-progress: true\\n25: \\n26: env:\\n27:   ALPINE_IMAGE: 308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/tool/alpine\\n28:   AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1\\n29: \\n30: permissions: read-all\\n31: \\n32: jobs:\\n33:   get-label-type:\\n34:     if: github.ref_name }}\\n41:       curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\\n42: \\n43:   docker-build:\\n44:     environment: ${{ (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.event.ref, [linux.12xlarge]\\n51:         docker-image-name: [\\n52:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3-gcc11,\\n53:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda13.0-cudnn9-py3-gcc11,\\n54: pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.11-clang12,\\n60:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.12-clang12,\\n61:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.13-clang12,\\n62:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.14-clang12,\\n63:           pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3,\\n64:           pytorch-linux-noble-rocm-n-py3,\\n65:           pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3-benchmarks,\\n66:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3.10-clang12,\\n67:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.10-gcc11,\\n68:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3-gcc11-inductor-benchmarks,\\n69:           pytorch-linux-noble-xpu-n-py3,\\n74:           pytorch-linux-noble-xpu-n-py3-inductor-benchmarks,\\n75:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3-clang18-asan,\\n76:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3-clang12-onnx,\\n77:           pytorch-linux-jammy-linter,\\n78:           pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3.10-linter,\\n79:           # TODO: Re-enable me when docker pin update happens\\n80:           # pytorch-linux-jammy-py3-clang12-executorch,\\n81:           pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.12-triton-cpu,\\n82:           pytorch-linux-noble-riscv64-py3.12-gcc14\\n83:         ]\\n84:         include:\\n85:           - docker-image-name: pytorch-linux-jammy-aarch64-py3.10-gcc13\\n86:             runner: linux.arm64.m7g.4xlarge\\n87:           - docker-image-name: pytorch-linux-jammy-aarch64-py3.10-clang21\\n88:             runner: linux.arm64.m7g.4xlarge\\n89:           - docker-image-name: pytorch-linux-jammy-aarch64-py3.10-gcc13-inductor-benchmarks\\n90: \\\"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}${{ matrix.runner }}\\\"\\n94:     runs-on: \\\"${{ matrix.runner }}\\\"\\n95:     steps:\\n96:       - name: Clean workspace\\n97:         shell: bash\\n98:         run: |\\n99:           echo \\\"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}\\\"\\n100:           sudo rm -rf \\\"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}\\\"\\n101:           mkdir \\\"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}\\\"\\n102: \\n103:       # [see note: pytorch repo ref]\\n104:       # deep clone (fetch-depth 0) required for git merge-base\\n105:       - name: Checkout PyTorch\\n106:         uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\\n107: \\n108:       - name: Setup Linux\\n109:         uses: ./.github/actions/setup-linux\\n110: \\n111:       - name: Build docker image\\n112:         id: build-docker-image\\n113:         uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/calculate-docker-image@release/2.10\\n114:         with:\\n115:           docker-image-name: ci-image:${{ matrix.docker-image-name }}\\n116:           always-rebuild: true\\n117:           push: true\\n118: \\n119:       - name: Pull docker image\\n120:         uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/pull-docker-image@release/2.10\\n121:         with:\\n122:           docker-image: ${{ steps.build-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\\n123: \\n124:       - name: Generate output\\n125:         if: contains(matrix.docker-image-name, 'rocm')\\n126:         id: generate_output\\n127:         run: |\\n128:           docker_image_name=\\\"${{ matrix.docker-image-name }}\\\"\\n129:           docker_image_tag=\\\"${{ steps.build-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\\\"\\n130:           echo \\\"${docker_image_name}=${docker_image_tag}\\\" >> docker-builds-output-${docker_image_name}.txt\\n131: \\n132:       - name: Upload artifacts\\n133:         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4.4.0\\n134:         if: contains(matrix.docker-image-name, 'rocm')\\n135:         with:\\n136:           name: docker-builds-artifacts-${{ matrix.docker-image-name }}\\n137:           retention-days: 14\\n138:           path: ./docker-builds-output-${{ matrix.docker-image-name }}.txt\\n139: \\n140:       - uses: nick-fields/retry@7152eba30c6575329ac0576536151aca5a72780e # v3.0.0\\n141:         name: Push to https://ghcr.io/\\n142:         id: push-to-ghcr-io\\n143:         if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' }}\\n144:         env:\\n145:           ECR_DOCKER_IMAGE: ${{ steps.build-docker-image.outputs.docker-image }}\\n146:           GHCR_PAT: ${{ secrets.GHCR_PAT }}\\n147:         with:\\n148:           shell: bash\\n149:           timeout_minutes: 60\\n150:           max_attempts: 5\\n151:           retry_wait_seconds: 90\\n152:           command: |\\n153:             ghcr_image=\\\"ghcr.io/pytorch/ci-image\\\"\\n154:             tag=${ECR_DOCKER_IMAGE##*:}\\n155:             # Push docker image to the ghcr.io\\n156:             echo $GHCR_PAT | docker login ghcr.io -u pytorch --password-stdin\\n157:             docker tag \\\"${ECR_DOCKER_IMAGE}\\\" \\\"${ghcr_image}:${tag}\\\"\\n158:             docker push 308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/${{ contains(matrix.runner, 'arm64') && 'arm64v8' || 'tool' }}/alpine\\n164:         if: always()\\n165: \\n166:       - name: Teardown Linux\\n167:         uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/teardown-linux@release/2.10\\n168:         if: always()\\n169:
