\",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/workflows/inductor-perf-test-nightly-xpu.yml\"}"
273. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/write_batch1.py << 'EOFPYTHON'\nimport os\nimport json\n\nfiles_content = {\n    '.github/workflows/inductor-perf-test-nightly-h100.yml': '''name: inductor-perf-nightly-h100\n\non:\n  schedule:\n    - cron: 15 0 * * 1-6\n    - cron: 0 7 * * 0\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      training:\n        description: Run training (on by default)?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: true\n      inference:\n        description: Run inference (on by default)?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: true\n      default:\n        description: Run inductor_default?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      dynamic:\n        description: Run inductor_dynamic_shapes?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      cppwrapper:\n        description: Run inductor_cpp_wrapper?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      cudagraphs:\n        description: Run inductor_cudagraphs?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: true\n      freezing_cudagraphs:\n        description: Run inductor_cudagraphs with freezing for inference?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      aotinductor:\n        description: Run aot_inductor for inference?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      maxautotune:\n        description: Run inductor_max_autotune?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      benchmark_configs:\n        description: The list of configs used the benchmark\n        required: false\n        type: string\n        default: inductor_huggingface_perf_cuda_h100,inductor_timm_perf_cuda_h100,inductor_torchbench_perf_cuda_h100\n  pull_request:\n    # Changing these files guarantees that this workflow needs to be run\n    paths:\n      - .github/workflows/inductor-perf-test-nightly-h100.yml\n      - .ci/docker/ci_commit_pins/huggingface-requirements.txt\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}-${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\npermissions:\n  id-token: write\n  contents: read\n\njobs:\n  get-label-type:\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    if: ${{ (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n      opt_out_experiments: lf\n\n  build:\n    name: build\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      # Use a bigger runner here because CUDA_ARCH 9.0 is only built for H100\n      # or newer GPUs, so it doesn't benefit much from existing compiler cache\n      # from trunk. Also use a memory-intensive runner here because memory is\n      # usually the bottleneck\n      runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm90\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3-gcc11-inductor-benchmarks\n      cuda-arch-list: '9.0'\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 1, num_shards: 5, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 2, num_shards: 5, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 3, num_shards: 5, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 4, num_shards: 5, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 5, num_shards: 5, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 1, num_shards: 7, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 2, num_shards: 7, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 3, num_shards: 7, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 4, num_shards: 7, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 5, num_shards: 7, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 6, num_shards: 7, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 7, num_shards: 7, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 1, num_shards: 9, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 2, num_shards: 9, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 3, num_shards: 9, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 4, num_shards: 9, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 5, num_shards: 9, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 6, num_shards: 9, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 7, num_shards: 9, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 8, num_shards: 9, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_cuda_h100\", shard: 9, num_shards: 9, runner: \"linux.aws.h100\" },\n        ]}\n      selected-test-configs: ${{ inputs.benchmark_configs }}\n      build-additional-packages: \"vision audio fbgemm torchao\"\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test-periodically:\n    name: test-periodically\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build\n    if: github.event.schedule == '15 0 * * 1-6'\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      dashboard-tag: training-true-inference-true-default-true-dynamic-true-cudagraphs-true-cppwrapper-true-aotinductor-true-freezing_cudagraphs-true\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      timeout-minutes: 720\n      # disable monitor in perf tests, next step is to enable it\n      disable-monitor: false\n      monitor-log-interval: 15\n      monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test-weekly:\n    name: test-weekly\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build\n    if: github.event.schedule == '0 7 * * 0'\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      dashboard-tag: training-true-inference-true-default-true-dynamic-true-cudagraphs-true-cppwrapper-true-aotinductor-true-freezing_cudagraphs-true-maxautotune-true-freeze_autotune_cudagraphs-true\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      timeout-minutes: 1440\n      # disable monitor in perf tests, next step is to enable it\n      disable-monitor: false\n      monitor-log-interval: 15\n      monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test:\n    name: test\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build\n    # The pull_request trigger is used in PR to bump transformers pin which always\n    # needs one round of benchmark\n    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' || github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      dashboard-tag: training-${{ inputs.training || 'true' }}-inference-${{ inputs.inference || 'true' }}-default-${{ inputs.default || 'true' }}-dynamic-${{ inputs.dynamic || 'true' }}-cudagraphs-${{ inputs.cudagraphs || 'true' }}-cppwrapper-${{ inputs.cppwrapper || 'false' }}-aotinductor-${{ inputs.aotinductor || 'false' }}-maxautotune-${{ inputs.maxautotune || 'false' }}-freezing_cudagraphs-${{ inputs.freezing_cudagraphs || 'false' }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      timeout-minutes: 720\n      # disable monitor in perf tests for more investigation\n      disable-monitor: false\n      monitor-log-interval: 15\n      monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n''',\n    '.github/workflows/inductor-micro-benchmark.yml': open('/dev/stdin').read() if False else '''name: inductor-micro-benchmark\n\non:\n  schedule:\n    - cron: 0 7 * * *\n  push:\n    tags:\n      - ciflow/inductor-micro-benchmark/*\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}-${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\npermissions:\n  id-token: write\n  contents: read\n\njobs:\n  get-default-label-prefix:\n    name: get-default-label-prefix\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    if: ${{ (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n      opt_out_experiments: lf\n\n  build:\n    name: cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs:\n      - get-default-label-prefix\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-default-label-prefix.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3-gcc11-inductor-benchmarks\n      cuda-arch-list: '8.0'\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"inductor-micro-benchmark\", shard: 1, num_shards: 1, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\", owners: [\"oncall:pt2\"] },\n        ]}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test:\n    name: cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      timeout-minutes: 720\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  build-cuda13:\n    name: cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs:\n      - get-default-label-prefix\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-default-label-prefix.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda13.0-cudnn9-py3-gcc11-inductor-benchmarks\n      cuda-arch-list: '8.0'\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"inductor-micro-benchmark\", shard: 1, num_shards: 1, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\", owners: [\"oncall:pt2\"] },\n        ]}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test-cuda13:\n    name: cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build-cuda13\n    with:\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build-cuda13.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build-cuda13.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      timeout-minutes: 720\n    secrets: inherit\n''',\n    '.github/workflows/rocm-mi300.yml': '''name: rocm-mi300\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n      - release/*\n    tags:\n      - ciflow/rocm/*\n      - ciflow/rocm-mi300/*\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  schedule:\n    - cron: 29 8 * * *  # about 1:29am PDT\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}-${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\npermissions: read-all\n\njobs:\n  target-determination:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: before-test\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/target_determination.yml\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n\n  get-label-type:\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    if: ${{ (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  linux-noble-rocm-py3_12-build:\n    if: ${{ (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    name: linux-noble-rocm-py3.12-mi300\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-noble-rocm-py3.12-mi300\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-noble-rocm-n-py3\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"default\", shard: 1, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.rocm.gpu.gfx942.1.b\" },\n          { config: \"default\", shard: 2, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.rocm.gpu.gfx942.1.b\" },\n          { config: \"default\", shard: 3, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.rocm.gpu.gfx942.1.b\" },\n          { config: \"default\", shard: 4, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.rocm.gpu.gfx942.1.b\" },\n          { config: \"default\", shard: 5, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.rocm.gpu.gfx942.1.b\" },\n          { config: \"default\", shard: 6, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.rocm.gpu.gfx942.1.b\" },\n        ]}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-noble-rocm-py3_12-test:\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    name: linux-noble-rocm-py3.12-mi300\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_rocm-test.yml\n    needs:\n      - linux-noble-rocm-py3_12-build\n      - target-determination\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.linux-noble-rocm-py3_12-build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.linux-noble-rocm-py3_12-build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.linux-noble-rocm-py3_12-build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n    secrets: inherit\n''',\n    '.github/workflows/test-b200.yml': '''# B200 Smoke Tests CI Workflow\n#\n# This workflow runs smoke tests on B200 hardware\n#\n# Flow:\n# 1. Builds PyTorch with CUDA 12.8+ and sm100 architecture for B200\n# 2. Runs smoke tests on linux.dgx.b200 runner\n# 3. Tests executed are defined in .ci/pytorch/test.sh -> test_python_smoke_b200() function\n#    - Includes matmul, scaled_matmul, FP8, and FlashAttention CuTe tests\n#    - FlashAttention CuTe DSL is installed as part of test execution\n#\n# Triggered by:\n# - Pull requests modifying this workflow file\n# - Manual dispatch\n# - Schedule (every 6 hours)\n# - Adding ciflow/b200 label to a PR (creates ciflow/b200/* tag)\n\nname: B200 Smoke Tests\n\non:\n  pull_request:\n    paths:\n      - .github/workflows/test-b200.yml\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  schedule:\n    - cron: 0 */2 * * *  # every 2 hours\n  push:\n    tags:\n      - ciflow/b200/*\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}-${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\npermissions:\n  id-token: write\n  contents: read\n\njobs:\n\n  get-label-type:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm100-build:\n    name: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm100\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      runner: linux.r7i.4xlarge\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm100\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3-gcc11\n      cuda-arch-list: '10.0'\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"smoke_b200\", shard: 1, num_shards: 1, runner: \"linux.dgx.b200\" },\n        ]}\n      # config: \"smoke_b200\" maps to test_python_smoke_b200() in .ci/pytorch/test.sh\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm100-test:\n    name: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm100\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs:\n      - linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm100-build\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm100-build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm100-build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm100-build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      aws-role-to-assume: arn:aws:iam::308535385114:role/gha_workflow_s3_and_ecr_read_only\n    secrets: inherit\n''',\n}\n\nos.chdir('/workspace')\nfor fpath, content in files_content.items():\n    dpath = os.path.dirname(fpath)\n    os.makedirs(dpath, exist_ok=True)\n    with open(fpath, 'w') as f:\n        f.write(content)\n    print(f\"\u2713 {fpath}\")\n\nprint(f\"\\nWrote {len(files_content)} files\")\nEOFPYTHON\npython3 /tmp/write_batch1.py\n",
  "description": "Write files 3-6 in first batch"
}
Output
"\u2713 .github/workflows/inductor-perf-test-nightly-h100.yml\n\u2713 .github/workflows/inductor-micro-benchmark.yml\n\u2713 .github/workflows/rocm-mi300.yml\n\u2713 .github/workflows/test-b200.yml\n\nWrote 4 files"
274. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/write_batch2.py << 'EOFPYTHON'\nimport os\n\nfiles_content = {\n    '.github/workflows/rocm-navi31.yml': '''name: rocm-navi31\n\non:\n  push:\n    tags:\n      - ciflow/rocm-navi31/*\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  schedule:\n    # We have several schedules so jobs can check github.event.schedule to activate only for a fraction of the runs.\n    # Also run less frequently on weekends.\n    - cron: 45 */2 * * 1-5\n    - cron: 45 4,12 * * 0,6\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}-${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\npermissions: read-all\n\njobs:\n  target-determination:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: before-test\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/target_determination.yml\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n\n  get-label-type:\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    if: ${{ (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-build:\n    if: ${{ (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    name: linux-jammy-rocm-py3.10\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-rocm-py3.10\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3\n      sync-tag: rocm-build\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"default\", shard: 1, num_shards: 2, runner: \"linux.rocm.gpu.gfx1100\" },\n          { config: \"default\", shard: 2, num_shards: 2, runner: \"linux.rocm.gpu.gfx1100\" },\n        ]}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-test:\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    name: linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_rocm-test.yml\n    needs:\n      - linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-build\n      - target-determination\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      tests-to-include: >-\n         ${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' && 'test_nn test_torch test_cuda test_ops test_unary_ufuncs test_binary_ufuncs\n         test_autograd inductor/test_torchinductor inductor/test_kernel_benchmark\n         inductor/test_pad_mm inductor/test_benchmark_fusion inductor/test_aot_inductor\n         inductor/test_torchinductor inductor/test_decompose_mem_bound_mm\n         inductor/test_flex_attention inductor/test_max_autotune' || '' }}\n    secrets: inherit\n''',\n    '.github/workflows/generated-macos-arm64-binary-libtorch-release-nightly.yml': '''# @generated DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\n\n# Template is at:    .github/templates/macos_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2\n# Generation script: .github/scripts/generate_ci_workflows.py\nname: macos-arm64-binary-libtorch-release\n\non:\n# TODO: Migrate to new ciflow trigger, reference https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/pull/70321\n  push:\n    # NOTE: Meta Employees can trigger new nightlies using: https://fburl.com/trigger_pytorch_nightly_build\n    branches:\n      - nightly\n    tags:\n      # NOTE: Binary build pipelines should only get triggered on release candidate builds\n      # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\n      - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\n      - 'ciflow/binaries/*'\n      - 'ciflow/binaries_libtorch/*'\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\nenv:\n  ALPINE_IMAGE: \"308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/tool/alpine\"\n  AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1\n  BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: macos-arm64-binary-libtorch-release\n  GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n  PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}\n  SKIP_ALL_TESTS: 0\nconcurrency:\n  group: macos-arm64-binary-libtorch-release-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\njobs:\n  libtorch-cpu-shared-with-deps-release-build:\n    if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    runs-on: macos-14-xlarge\n    timeout-minutes: 240\n    env:\n      PYTORCH_ROOT: ${{ github.workspace }}/pytorch\n      PACKAGE_TYPE: libtorch\n      # TODO: This is a legacy variable that we eventually want to get rid of in\n      #       favor of GPU_ARCH_VERSION\n      DESIRED_CUDA: cpu\n      GPU_ARCH_TYPE: cpu\n      SKIP_ALL_TESTS: 1\n      LIBTORCH_CONFIG: release\n      LIBTORCH_VARIANT: shared-with-deps\n      # This is a dummy value for libtorch to work correctly with our batch scripts\n      # without this value pip does not get installed for some reason\n      DESIRED_PYTHON: \"3.10\"\n    steps:\n      # NOTE: These environment variables are put here so that they can be applied on every job equally\n      #       They are also here because setting them at a workflow level doesn't give us access to the\n      #       runner.temp variable, which we need.\n      - name: Populate binary env\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          # shellcheck disable=SC2129\n          echo \"BINARY_ENV_FILE=${RUNNER_TEMP}/env\" >> \"${GITHUB_ENV}\"\n          # shellcheck disable=SC2129\n          echo \"PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR=${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts\" >> \"${GITHUB_ENV}\"\n          # shellcheck disable=SC2129\n          echo \"MAC_PACKAGE_WORK_DIR=${RUNNER_TEMP}\" >> \"${GITHUB_ENV}\"\n      - name: Setup Python\n        uses: actions/setup-python@v6\n        with:\n          # .4 version is min minor for 3.10, and also no-gil version of 3.13 needs at least 3.13.3\n          python-version: \"3.10.4\"\n          freethreaded: false\n      - name: Checkout PyTorch\n        uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n          submodules: recursive\n          path: pytorch\n          show-progress: false\n      - name: Clean PyTorch checkout\n        run: |\n          # Remove any artifacts from the previous checkouts\n          git clean -fxd\n        working-directory: pytorch\n      - name: Populate binary env\n        run: |\n          \"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_populate_env.sh\"\n      - name: Build PyTorch binary\n        run: |\n          set -eux -o pipefail\n          # shellcheck disable=SC1090\n          source \"${BINARY_ENV_FILE:-/Users/distiller/project/env}\"\n          mkdir -p \"$PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR\"\n\n          # Build\n          USE_PYTORCH_METAL_EXPORT=1\n          USE_COREML_DELEGATE=1\n          TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME=\"${TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME//-/_}\"\n          export USE_PYTORCH_METAL_EXPORT\n          export USE_COREML_DELEGATE\n          export TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME\n          \"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.ci/wheel/build_wheel.sh\"\n      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4.4.0\n        if: always()\n        with:\n          name: libtorch-cpu-shared-with-deps-release\n          retention-days: 14\n          if-no-files-found: error\n          path: \"${{ env.PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR }}\"\n  libtorch-cpu-shared-with-deps-release-upload:  # Uploading\n    if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    needs: libtorch-cpu-shared-with-deps-release-build\n    with:\n      PYTORCH_ROOT: /pytorch\n      PACKAGE_TYPE: libtorch\n      # TODO: This is a legacy variable that we eventually want to get rid of in\n      #       favor of GPU_ARCH_VERSION\n      DESIRED_CUDA: cpu\n      GPU_ARCH_TYPE: cpu\n      DOCKER_IMAGE: libtorch-cxx11-builder\n      DOCKER_IMAGE_TAG_PREFIX: cpu\n      LIBTORCH_CONFIG: release\n      LIBTORCH_VARIANT: shared-with-deps\n      build_name: libtorch-cpu-shared-with-deps-release\n      use_s3: False\n    secrets:\n      github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_binary-upload.yml\n''',\n    '.github/workflows/inductor-perf-test-nightly.yml': '''name: inductor-A100-perf-nightly\n\non:\n  schedule:\n    - cron: 0 7 * * 1-6\n    - cron: 0 7 * * 0\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      training:\n        description: Run training (on by default)?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: true\n      inference:\n        description: Run inference (on by default)?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: true\n      default:\n        description: Run inductor_default?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      dynamic:\n        description: Run inductor_dynamic_shapes?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      cppwrapper:\n        description: Run inductor_cpp_wrapper?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      cudagraphs:\n        description: Run inductor_cudagraphs?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: true\n      freezing_cudagraphs:\n        description: Run inductor_cudagraphs with freezing for inference?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      aotinductor:\n        description: Run aot_inductor for inference?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      maxautotune:\n        description: Run inductor_max_autotune?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      benchmark_configs:\n        description: The list of configs used the benchmark\n        required: false\n        type: string\n        default: inductor_huggingface_perf,inductor_timm_perf,inductor_torchbench_perf,cachebench\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}-${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\npermissions:\n  id-token: write\n  contents: read\n\njobs:\n  get-label-type:\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    if: ${{ (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n      opt_out_experiments: lf\n\n  build:\n    name: cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      # Every bit to make perf run faster helps\n      runner: linux.12xlarge.memory\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3-gcc11-inductor-benchmarks\n      cuda-arch-list: '8.0'\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf\", shard: 1, num_shards: 5, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf\", shard: 2, num_shards: 5, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf\", shard: 3, num_shards: 5, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf\", shard: 4, num_shards: 5, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf\", shard: 5, num_shards: 5, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf\", shard: 1, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf\", shard: 2, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf\", shard: 3, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf\", shard: 4, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf\", shard: 5, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf\", shard: 6, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf\", shard: 1, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf\", shard: 2, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf\", shard: 3, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf\", shard: 4, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf\", shard: 5, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf\", shard: 6, num_shards: 6, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"cachebench\", shard: 1, num_shards: 2, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"cachebench\", shard: 2, num_shards: 2, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n        ]}\n      selected-test-configs: ${{ inputs.benchmark_configs }}\n      build-additional-packages: \"vision audio fbgemm torchao\"\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test-nightly:\n    name: cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build\n    if: github.event.schedule == '0 7 * * 1-6'\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      dashboard-tag: training-true-inference-true-default-true-dynamic-true-cudagraphs-true-cppwrapper-true-aotinductor-true-freezing_cudagraphs-true\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      timeout-minutes: 720\n      disable-monitor: false\n      monitor-log-interval: 15\n      monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test-weekly:\n    name: cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build\n    if: github.event.schedule == '0 7 * * 0'\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      dashboard-tag: training-true-inference-true-default-true-dynamic-true-cudagraphs-true-cppwrapper-true-aotinductor-true-freezing_cudagraphs-true-maxautotune-true-freeze_autotune_cudagraphs-true\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      timeout-minutes: 1440\n      # disable monitor in perf tests, next step is to enable it\n      disable-monitor: false\n      monitor-log-interval: 15\n      monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test:\n    name: cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build\n    if: github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      dashboard-tag: training-${{ inputs.training }}-inference-${{ inputs.inference }}-default-${{ inputs.default }}-dynamic-${{ inputs.dynamic }}-cudagraphs-${{ inputs.cudagraphs }}-cppwrapper-${{ inputs.cppwrapper }}-aotinductor-${{ inputs.aotinductor }}-maxautotune-${{ inputs.maxautotune }}-freezing_cudagraphs-${{ inputs.freezing_cudagraphs }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      timeout-minutes: 720\n      disable-monitor: false\n      monitor-log-interval: 15\n      monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  build-cuda13:\n    name: cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n linux-jammy-cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda13.0-cudnn9-py3-gcc11-inductor-benchmarks\n      cuda-arch-list: '8.0'\n      test-matrix: |\n    test-matrix: ${{ needs.build-cuda13.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      timeout-minutes: 720\n      disable-monitor: false\n      monitor-log-interval: 15\n      monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test-weekly-cuda13:\n    name: cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build-cuda13\n    if: github.event.schedule == '0 7 * * 0'\n training-true-inference-true-default-true-dynamic-true-cudagraphs-true-cppwrapper-true-aotinductor-true-freezing_cudagraphs-true-maxautotune-true-freeze_autotune_cudagraphs-true\n      docker-image: enable it\n      disable-monitor: false\n      monitor-log-interval: 15\n      monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test-cuda13:\n    name: cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build-cuda13\n    if: github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'\n    with:\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n      dashboard-tag: training-${{ inputs.training }}-inference-${{ inputs.inference }}-default-${{ inputs.default }}-dynamic-${{ inputs.dynamic }}-cudagraphs-${{ inputs.cudagraphs }}-cppwrapper-${{ inputs.cppwrapper }}-aotinductor-${{ inputs.aotinductor }}-maxautotune-${{ inputs.maxautotune }}-freezing_cudagraphs-${{ inputs.freezing_cudagraphs }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build-cuda13.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build-cuda13.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      timeout-minutes: 720\n      disable-monitor: false\n      monitor-log-interval: 15\n      monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n''',\n    '.github/workflows/lint-bc.yml': '''name: BC Lint\n\non:\n  pull_request:\n    types:\n      - opened\n      - synchronize\n      - reopened\n    branches-ignore:\n      - nightly\n  push:\n    tags:\n      # TODO: Remove me later\n      -  ciflow/inductor-cu126/*\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  bc_linter:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Run BC Lint Action\n        uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/actions/bc-lint@release/2.10\n        with:\n          repo: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name }}\n          base_sha: ${{ github.event.pull_request.base.sha }}\n          head_sha: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}\n          suppression: ${{ contains(github.event.pull_request.labels.*.name, 'suppress-api-compatibility-check') || contains(github.event.pull_request.labels.*.name, 'suppress-bc-linter') }}\n          docs_link: 'https://github.com/pytorch/test-infra/wiki/BC-Linter'\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n''',\n    '.github/workflows/target_determination.yml': '''name: target-determination\n\non:\n  workflow_call:\n\njobs:\n\n  get-label-type:\n    name: get-label-type\n    # Don't run on forked repos\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  target-determination:\n    # Don't run on forked repos\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    runs-on: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.2xlarge\"\n    needs: get-label-type\n    steps:\n      # [pytorch repo ref]\n      # Use a pytorch/pytorch reference instead of a reference to the local\n      # checkout because when we run this action we don't *have* a local\n      # checkout. In other cases you should prefer a local checkout.\n      - name: Checkout PyTorch\n        uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/actions/checkout-pytorch@release/2.10\n        with:\n          submodules: false\n\n      - name: Setup Linux\n        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-linux\n\n      - name: Get workflow job id\n        id: get-job-id\n        uses: ./.github/actions/get-workflow-job-id\n        if: always()\n        with:\n          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n\n      - name: Download pytest cache\n        uses: ./.github/actions/pytest-cache-download\n        continue-on-error: true\n        with:\n          cache_dir: .pytest_cache\n          job_identifier: ${{ github.workflow }}\n\n      - name: Download LLM Artifacts from S3\n        uses: seemethere/download-artifact-s3@1da556a7aa0a088e3153970611f6c432d58e80e6 # v4.2.0\n        continue-on-error: true\n        with:\n          name: llm_results\n          path: .additional_ci_files/llm_results\n\n      - name: Do TD\n        id: td\n        continue-on-error: true\n        env:\n          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n          GITHUB_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.repository }}\n          GITHUB_WORKFLOW: ${{ github.workflow }}\n          GITHUB_JOB: ${{ github.job }}\n          GITHUB_RUN_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}\n          GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}\n          GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT: ${{ github.run_attempt }}\n          GITHUB_REF: ${{ github.ref }}\n          JOB_ID: ${{ steps.get-job-id.outputs.job-id }}\n          JOB_NAME: ${{ steps.get-job-id.outputs.job-name }}\n          PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}\n        run: |\n          unzip -o .additional_ci_files/llm_results/mappings.zip -d .additional_ci_files/llm_results || true\n          python3 -m pip install boto3==1.35.42\n          python3 tools/testing/do_target_determination_for_s3.py\n\n      - name: Upload TD results to s3\n        uses: seemethere/upload-artifact-s3@baba72d0712b404f646cebe0730933554ebce96a # v5.1.0\n        if: steps.td.outcome == 'success'\n        with:\n          name: td_results\n          retention-days: 14\n          if-no-files-found: error\n          path: td_results.json\n\n      - name: Store TD results on GHA\n        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4.6.2\n        if: steps.td.outcome == 'success'\n        with:\n          name: td_results.json\n          retention-days: 14\n          if-no-files-found: error\n          path: td_results.json\n''',\n    '.github/workflows/periodic-rocm-mi200.yml': '''name: periodic-rocm-mi200\n\non:\n  schedule:\n    # We have several schedules so jobs can check github.event.schedule to activate only for a fraction of the runs.\n    # Also run less frequently on weekends.\n    - cron: 45 0,8,16 * * 1-5\n    - cron: 45 4 * * 0,6\n    - cron: 45 4,12,20 * * 1-5\n    - cron: 45 12 * * 0,6\n    - cron: 29 8 * * *  # about 1:29am PDT, for mem leak check and rerun disabled tests\n  push:\n    tags:\n      - ciflow/periodic-rocm-mi200/*\n    branches:\n      - release/*\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}-${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' }}-${{ github.event.schedule }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\npermissions:\n  id-token: write\n  contents: read\n\njobs:\n  llm-td:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: before-test\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/llm_td_retrieval.yml\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n\n  target-determination:\n    name: before-test\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/target_determination.yml\n    needs: llm-td\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n\n  get-label-type:\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    if: (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-build:\n    name: linux-jammy-rocm-py3.10\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-rocm-py3.10\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-rocm-n-py3\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"distributed\", shard: 1, num_shards: 3, runner: \"linux.rocm.gpu.4\", owners: [\"module:rocm\", \"oncall:distributed\"] },\n          { config: \"distributed\", shard: 2, num_shards: 3, runner: \"linux.rocm.gpu.4\", owners: [\"module:rocm\", \"oncall:distributed\"] },\n          { config: \"distributed\", shard: 3, num_shards: 3, runner: \"linux.rocm.gpu.4\", owners: [\"module:rocm\", \"oncall:distributed\"] },\n        ]}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-test:\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n    name: linux-jammy-rocm-py3.10\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_rocm-test.yml\n    needs:\n      - linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-build\n      - target-determination\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-rocm-py3_10-build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n    secrets: inherit\n''',\n    '.github/workflows/inductor-perf-compare.yml': '''name: inductor-A100-perf-compare\n\non:\n  push:\n    tags:\n      - ciflow/inductor-perf-compare/*\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\npermissions:\n  id-token: write\n  contents: read\n\njobs:\n  get-default-label-prefix:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: get-default-label-prefix\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n      opt_out_experiments: lf\n\n  build:\n    name: cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs:\n      - get-default-label-prefix\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-default-label-prefix.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3-gcc11-inductor-benchmarks\n      cuda-arch-list: '8.0'\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf_compare\", shard: 1, num_shards: 1, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf_compare\", shard: 1, num_shards: 2, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf_compare\", shard: 2, num_shards: 2, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_compare\", shard: 1, num_shards: 1, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n        ]}\n      build-additional-packages: \"vision audio fbgemm torchao\"\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test:\n    name: cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      # disable monitor in perf tests for more investigation\n      disable-monitor: false\n      monitor-log-interval: 15\n      monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  build-cuda13:\n    name: cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs:\n      - get-default-label-prefix\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-default-label-prefix.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda13.0-cudnn9-py3-gcc11-inductor-benchmarks\n      cuda-arch-list: '8.0'\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"inductor_huggingface_perf_compare\", shard: 1, num_shards: 1, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf_compare\", shard: 1, num_shards: 2, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_timm_perf_compare\", shard: 2, num_shards: 2, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_compare\", shard: 1, num_shards: 1, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n        ]}\n      build-additional-packages: \"vision audio torchao\"\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test-cuda13:\n    name: cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build-cuda13\n    with:\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build-cuda13.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build-cuda13.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      # disable monitor in perf tests for more investigation\n      disable-monitor: false\n      monitor-log-interval: 15\n      monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n''',\n    '.github/workflows/torchbench.yml': '''name: torchbench\n\non:\n  push:\n    tags:\n }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}-${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\npermissions:\n  id-token: write\n  contents: read\n\njobs:\n || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  build:\n    name: cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs:\n      - get-default-label-prefix\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-default-label-prefix.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n \"torchbench_gcp_smoketest\", shard: 1, num_shards: 1, runner: \"linux.aws.a100\" },\n        ]}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  test:\n    name: cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm80\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs: build\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n    secrets: inherit\n''',\n}\n\nos.chdir('/workspace')\nfor fpath, content in files_content.items():\n    dpath = os.path.dirname(fpath)\n    os.makedirs(dpath, exist_ok=True)\n    with open(fpath, 'w') as f:\n        f.write(content)\n    print(f\"\u2713 {fpath}\")\n\nprint(f\"\\nWrote {len(files_content)} files\")\nEOFPYTHON\npython3 /tmp/write_batch2.py\n",
  "description": "Write files 7-16 (rocm-navi31 through torchbench)"
}

to get rid of in\\n59:       #       favor of GPU_ARCH_VERSION\\n60:       DESIRED_CUDA: cpu\\n61:       GPU_ARCH_TYPE: cpu\\n62:       SKIP_ALL_TESTS: 1\\n63:       LIBTORCH_CONFIG: debug\\n64:       LIBTORCH_VARIANT: shared-with-deps\\n65:       # This is a dummy value for libtorch to work correctly with our batch scripts\\n66:       # without this value pip does not get installed for some reason\\n67:       DESIRED_PYTHON: \\\"3.10\\\"\\n68:     steps:\\n69:       - name: Populate binary env\\n70:         shell: cmd\\n71:         run: |\\n72:           echo BINARY_ENV_FILE=%RUNNER_TEMP%/env>> %GITHUB_ENV%\\n73:           echo PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR=%RUNNER_TEMP%/artifacts>> %GITHUB_ENV%\\n74:           echo WIN_PACKAGE_WORK_DIR=%RUNNER_TEMP%>> %GITHUB_ENV%\\n75:       - name: Bootstrap folders\\n76:         shell: cmd\\n77:         run: |\\n78:           mkdir \\\"%NIGHTLIES_PYTORCH_ROOT%\\\"\\n79:           mkdir \\\"%PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR%\\\"\\n80:       - name: Enable long paths\\n81:         shell: cmd\\n82:         run: |\\n83:           git config --system --get core.longpaths || echo \\\"core.longpaths is not set, setting it now\\\"\\n84:           git config --system core.longpaths true\\n85:       - name: Git checkout PyTorch\\n86:         uses: actions/checkout@v4\\n87:         with:\\n88:           path: \\\"pytorch\\\"\\n89:           submodules: recursive\\n90:       - name: Bootstrap Python\\n91:         shell: cmd\\n92:         run: |\\n93:           \\\"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_python.bat\\\"\\n94:       - name: Bootstrap APL\\n95:         shell: cmd\\n96:         run: |\\n97:           \\\"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_apl.bat\\\"\\n98:       - name: Bootstrap Rust\\n99:         shell: cmd\\n100:         run: |\\n101:           \\\"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_rust.bat\\\"\\n102:       - name: Bootstrap sccache\\n103:         shell: cmd\\n104:         run: |\\n105:           \\\"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_sccache.bat\\\"\\n106:       - name: Bootstrap Libuv\\n107:         shell: cmd\\n108:         run: |\\n109:           \\\"pytorch/.ci/pytorch/windows/arm64/bootstrap_libuv.bat\\\"\\n110:       - name: Populate binary env\\n111:         shell: bash\\n112:         run: |\\n113:           \\\"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_populate_env.sh\\\"\\n114:       - name: Build PyTorch binary\\n115:         shell: bash\\n116:         run: |\\n117:           \\\"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_windows_build.sh\\\"\\n118:       - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4.4.0\\n119:         if: always()\\n120:         with:\\n121:           name: libtorch-cpu-shared-with-deps-debug\\n122:           retention-days: 14\\n123:           if-no-files-found: error\\n124:           path: \\\"${{ env.PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR }}\\\"\\n125:   libtorch-cpu-shared-with-deps-debug-test:  # Testing\\n126:     if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\\n127:     needs:\\n128:       - libtorch-cpu-shared-with-deps-debug-build\\n129: binary env\\n147:         shell: cmd\\n148:         run: |\\n149:           echo BINARY_ENV_FILE=%RUNNER_TEMP%/env>> %GITHUB_ENV%\\n150:           echo   "path": ".github/workflows/inductor-periodic.yml",

"{\"content\":\"1: name: inductor-periodic\\n2: \\n3: on:\\n4:   push:\\n5:     tags:\\n6:       - ciflow/inductor-periodic/*\\n7:   workflow_dispatch:\\n8:   schedule:\\n9:     # Run every 4 hours during the week and every 12 hours on the weekend\\n10:     - cron: 45 0,4,8,12,16,20 * * 1-5\\n11:     - cron: 45 4,12 * * 0,6\\n12: \\n13: concurrency:\\n14:   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\\n15:   cancel-in-progress: true\\n16: \\n17: \\n18: permissions:\\n19:   id-token: write\\n20:   contents: read\\n21: \\n22: jobs:\\n23:   get-default-label-prefix:\\n24:     name: get-default-label-prefix\\n25:     uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\\n26:     if: ${{ (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\\n27:     with:\\n28:       triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\\n29:       issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\\n30: Output
"{\"content\":\"1: # @generated DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\\n2: \\n3: # Template is at:    .github/templates/macos_binary_build_workflow.yml.j2\\n4: # Generation script: .github/scripts/generate_ci_workflows.py\\n5: name: macos-arm64-binary-wheel\\n6: \\n7: on:\\n8: # TODO: Migrate to new ciflow trigger, reference https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/pull/70321\\n9:   push:\\n10:     # NOTE: Meta Employees can trigger new nightlies using: https://fburl.com/trigger_pytorch_nightly_build\\n11:     branches:\\n12:       - nightly\\n13:     tags:\\n14:       # NOTE: Binary build pipelines should only get triggered on release candidate builds\\n15:       # Release candidate tags look like: v1.11.0-rc1\\n16:       - v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc[0-9]+\\n17:       - 'ciflow/binaries/*'\\n18:       - 'ciflow/binaries_wheel/*'\\n19:   workflow_dispatch:\\n20: \\n21: env:\\n22:   ALPINE_IMAGE: \\\"308535385114.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/tool/alpine\\\"\\n23:   AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1\\n24:   BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: macos-arm64-binary-wheel\\n25:   GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\\n26:   PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}\\n27:   SKIP_ALL_TESTS: 0\\n28: concurrency:\\n29:   group: macos-arm64-binary-wheel-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\\n30:   cancel-in-progress: true\\n31: \\n32: jobs:\\n33:   wheel-py3_10-cpu-build:\\n34:     if: ${{ github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\\n35:     runs-on: macos-14-xlarge\\n36:     timeout-minutes: 240\\n37:     env:\\n38:       PYTORCH_ROOT: ${{ github.workspace }}/pytorch\\n39:       PACKAGE_TYPE: wheel\\n40:       # TODO: This is a legacy variable that we eventually want to get rid of in\\n41:       #       favor of GPU_ARCH_VERSION\\n42:       DESIRED_CUDA: cpu\\n43:       GPU_ARCH_TYPE: cpu\\n44:       SKIP_ALL_TESTS: 1\\n45:       DESIRED_PYTHON: \\\"3.10\\\"\\n46:     steps:\\n47:       # NOTE: These environment variables are put here so that they can be applied on every job equally\\n48:       #       They are also here because setting them at a workflow level doesn't give us access to the\\n49:       #       runner.temp variable, which we need.\\n50:       - name: Populate binary env\\n51:         shell: bash\\n52:         run: |\\n53:           # shellcheck disable=SC2129\\n54:           echo \\\"BINARY_ENV_FILE=${RUNNER_TEMP}/env\\\" >> \\\"${GITHUB_ENV}\\\"\\n55:           # shellcheck disable=SC2129\\n56:           echo \\\"PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR=${RUNNER_TEMP}/artifacts\\\" >> \\\"${GITHUB_ENV}\\\"\\n57:           # shellcheck disable=SC2129\\n58:           echo \\\"MAC_PACKAGE_WORK_DIR=${RUNNER_TEMP}\\\" >> \\\"${GITHUB_ENV}\\\"\\n59:       - name: Setup Python\\n60:         uses: actions/setup-python@v6\\n61:         with:\\n62:           # .4 version is min minor for 3.10, and also no-gil version of 3.13 needs at least 3.13.3\\n63:           python-version: \\\"3.10.4\\\"\\n64:           freethreaded: false\\n65:       - name: Checkout PyTorch\\n66:         uses: actions/checkout@v4\\n67:         with:\\n68:           submodules: recursive\\n69:           path: pytorch\\n70:           show-progress: false\\n71:       - name: Clean PyTorch checkout\\n72:         run: |\\n73:           # Remove any artifacts from the previous checkouts\\n74:           git clean -fxd\\n75:         working-directory: pytorch\\n76:       - name: Populate binary env\\n77:         run: |\\n78:           \\\"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.circleci/scripts/binary_populate_env.sh\\\"\\n79:       - name: Build PyTorch binary\\n80:         run: |\\n81:           set -eux -o pipefail\\n82:           # shellcheck disable=SC1090\\n83:           source \\\"${BINARY_ENV_FILE:-/Users/distiller/project/env}\\\"\\n84:           mkdir -p \\\"$PYTORCH_FINAL_PACKAGE_DIR\\\"\\n85: \\n86:           # Build\\n87:           USE_PYTORCH_METAL_EXPORT=1\\n88:           USE_COREML_DELEGATE=1\\n89:           TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME=\\\"${TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME//-/_}\\\"\\n90:           export USE_PYTORCH_METAL_EXPORT\\n91:           export USE_COREML_DELEGATE\\n92:           export TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME\\n93:           \\\"${PYTORCH_ROOT}/.ci/wheel/build_wheel.sh\\\"\\n94:       - name: Test PyTorch wheel\\n95:         run: |\\n96:           set -eux -o pipefail\\n97:           # shellcheck disable=SC1090\\n98:           source \\\"${BINARY_ENV_FILE:-/Users/distiller/project/env}\\\"\\n99:           pip uninstall -y \\\"$TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME\\\" || true\\n100:           pip uninstall -y \\\"$TORCH_PACKAGE_NAME\\\" || true\\n101: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/workflows/generated-macos-arm64-binary-wheel-nightly.yml%3FL1-100\"}"

{
  "path": ".github/workflows/test-check-binary.yml",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78"

Output
"{\"content\":\"1: name: Test check_binary\\n2: \\n3: on:\\n4:   pull_request:\\n5:     paths:\\n6:       - .github/workflows/test-check-binary.yml\\n7:       - .ci/pytorch/check_binary.sh\\n8:       - .ci/pytorch//smoke_test/smoke_test.py\\n9: \\n10: concurrency:\\n11:   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\\n12:   cancel-in-progress: true\\n13: \\n14: jobs:\\n15:   check_binary_linux_cpu:\\n16:     if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\\n17:     name: Test check_binary.sh for Linux CPU\\n18:     uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/workflows/linux_job_v2.yml@release/2.10\\n19:     with:\\n20:       docker-image: python:3.11\\n21:       docker-build-dir: \\\"skip-docker-build\\\"\\n22:       script: |\\n23:           # Install dependencies FIRST (before torch) as torch imports may need them\\n24:           pip install 'numpy>=1.21.2' 'protobuf>=3.20' 'typing-extensions>=4.8.0'\\n25:           pushd .ci/pytorch/\\n26:           pip install --pre torch --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/cpu\\n27:           DESIRED_PYTHON=3.11 DESIRED_CUDA=cpu PACKAGE_TYPE=manywheel ./check_binary.sh\\n28:           popd\\n29: \\n30:   check_binary_linux_cuda:\\n31:     if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\\n32:     name: Test check_binary.sh for Linux CUDA\\n33:     uses: pytorch/test-infra/.github/workflows/linux_job_v2.yml@release/2.10\\n34:     with:\\n35:       runner: linux.g4dn.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu\\n36:       docker-image: python:3.11\\n37:       docker-build-dir: \\\"skip-docker-build\\\"\\n38:       script: |\\n39:           # Install dependencies FIRST (before torch) as torch imports may need them\\n40:           pip install 'numpy>=1.21.2' 'protobuf>=3.20' 'typing-extensions>=4.8.0'\\n41:           STABLE_CUDA_VERSION=$(python3 .github/scripts/get_ci_variable.py --cuda-stable-version)\\n42:           CUDA_VERSION_NODOT=$(echo ${STABLE_CUDA_VERSION} | tr -d '.')\\n43:           pushd .ci/pytorch/\\n44:           pip install --pre torch --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/cu${CUDA_VERSION_NODOT}\\n45:           DESIRED_PYTHON=3.11 DESIRED_CUDA=cu${CUDA_VERSION_NODOT} PACKAGE_TYPE=manywheel ./check_binary.sh\\n46:           popd\\n47: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/workflows/test-check-binary.yml\"}"

  "path": ".github/workflows/quantization-periodic.yml",

"{\"content\":\"1: name: quantization-periodic\\n2: \\n3: on:\\n4:   push:\\n5:     tags:\\n6:       - ciflow/quantization-periodic/*\\n7:   workflow_dispatch:\\n8:   schedule:\\n9:     # run weekly\\n10:     - cron: \\\"45 0 * * 0\\\"\\n11: \\n12: concurrency:\\n13:   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}\\n14:   cancel-in-progress: true\\n15: \\n16: permissions:\\n17:   id-token: write\\n18:   contents: read\\n19: \\n20: jobs:\\n21:   get-default-label-prefix:\\n22:     name: get-default-label-prefix\\n23:     uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\\n24:     if: ${{ (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\\n25:     with:\\n26:       triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\\n27:       issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\\n28:       curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\\n29:       curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\\n30:       opt_out_experiments: lf\\n31: \\n32:   periodic-quantization-build:\\n33:     name: periodic-quantization-build\\n34:     uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\\n35:     needs: get-default-label-prefix\\n36:     with:\\n37:       runner_prefix: \\\"${{ needs.get-default-label-prefix.outputs.label-type }}\\\"\\n38:       build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3-gcc11\\n39:       docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3-gcc11\\n40:       cuda-arch-list: '8.9'\\n41:       test-matrix: |\\n42:         { include: [\\n43:           { config: \\\"quantization\\\", shard: 1, num_shards: 1, runner: \\\"${{ needs.get-default-label-prefix.outputs.label-type }}linux.g6.4xlarge.experimental.nvidia.gpu\\\" },\\n44:         ]}\\n45:     secrets: inherit\\n46:   periodic-test-quantization:\\n47:     name: periodic-test-quantization\\n48:     uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\\n49:     needs: periodic-quantization-build\\n50:     with:\\n51:       build-environment: ${{ needs.periodic-quantization-build.outputs.build-environment }}\\n52:       docker-image: ${{ needs.periodic-quantization-build.outputs.docker-image }}\\n53:       test-matrix: ${{ needs.periodic-quantization-build.outputs.test-matrix }}\\n54:     secrets: inherit\\n55: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/pytorch--863edc78@863edc787f5fa7950e0f3f86d4952641e1ef9c2c/-/blob/.github/workflows/quantization-periodic.yml\"}"

1-6\\n9:     # - cron: 0 7 * * 0\\n10:     # Does not perform max_autotune on CPU, so skip the weekly run setup\\n11:     - cron: 0 7 * * *\\n12:   # NB: GitHub has an upper limit of 10 inputs here\\n13:   workflow_dispatch:\\n14:     inputs:\\n15:       training:\\n16:         # CPU for training is not typical, but leave the option open here\\n17:         description: Run training (off by default)?\\n18:         required: false\\n19:         type: boolean\\n20:         default: false\\n21:       inference:\\n22:         description: Run inference (on by default)?\\n23:         required: false\\n24:         type: boolean\\n25:         default: true\\n26:       default:\\n27:         description: Run inductor_default?\\n28:         required: false\\n29:         type: boolean\\n30:         default: true\\n31:       dynamic:\\n32:         description: Run inductor_dynamic_shapes?\\n33:         required: false\\n34:         type: boolean\\n35:         default: false\\n36:       cppwrapper:\\n37:         description: Run inductor_cpp_wrapper?\\n38:         required: false\\n39:         type: boolean\\n40:         default: false\\n41:       aotinductor:\\n42:         description: Run aot_inductor for inference?\\n43:         required: false\\n44:         type: boolean\\n45:         default: false\\n46:       freezing:\\n47:         description: Run freezing?\\n48:         required: false\\n49:         type: boolean\\n50:         default: true\\n51:       benchmark_configs:\\n52:         description: The list of configs used the benchmark\\n53:         required: false\\n54:         type: string\\n55:         default: inductor_huggingface_perf_cpu_x86_zen,inductor_timm_perf_cpu_x86_zen,inductor_torchbench_perf_cpu_x86_zen\\n56: \\n57: 'workflow_dispatch' }}-${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' }}\\n59:   cancel-in-progress: true\\n60: \\n61: permissions:\\n62:   id-token: write\\n63:   contents: read\\n64: \\n65: jobs:\\n66: github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\\n70:     with:\\n71:       triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\\n72:       issue_owner: ${{  opt_out_experiments: lf\\n76: \\n77:   inductor-build:\\n78:     name: inductor-build\\n79:     uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\\n80:     needs: get-label-type\\n81:     with:\\n82: inputs.benchmark_configs }}\\n101:     secrets: inherit\\n102: \\n103:   inductor-test-nightly:\\n104:     name: inductor-test-nightly\\n105:     uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\\n106:     needs: inductor-build\\n107:     if: github.event.schedule == '0 7 * * *'\\n108:     with:\\n109:       build-environment: ${{ needs.inductor-build.outputs.build-environment }}\\n110:       dashboard-tag: training-false-inference-true-default-true-dynamic-true-cppwrapper-true-aotinductor-true-freezing-true\\n111:       docker-image: ${{ needs.inductor-build.outputs.docker-image }}\\n112:       test-matrix: ${{ needs.inductor-build.outputs.test-matrix }}\\n113:       timeout-minutes: 720\\n114:       # disable monitor in perf tests\\n115:       disable-monitor: false\\n116:       monitor-log-interval: 15\\n117:       monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\\n118:     secrets: inherit\\n119: \\n120:   inductor-test:\\n121:     name: inductor-test\\n122:     uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\\n123:     needs: inductor-build\\n124:     with:\\n125:       build-environment: ${{ needs.inductor-build.outputs.build-environment }}\\n126:       dashboard-tag: training-${{ inputs.training || 'false' }}-inference-${{ inputs.inference || 'true' }}-default-${{ inputs.default || 'true' }}-dynamic-${{ inputs.dynamic || 'true' }}-cppwrapper-${{ inputs.cppwrapper || 'true' }}-aotinductor-${{ inputs.aotinductor || 'true' }}-freezing-${{ inputs.freezing || 'true' }}\\n127:       docker-image: ${{ needs.inductor-build.outputs.docker-image }}\\n128: 285. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/write_remaining.py << 'EOFPYTHON'\nimport os\n\nfiles_content = {\n    '.github/workflows/slow.yml': '''# This workflow is dedicated to host slow jobs that are run only periodically because\n# they are too slow to run in every commit.  The list of slow tests can be found in\n# https://github.com/pytorch/test-infra/blob/generated-stats/stats/slow-tests.json\nname: slow\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches:\n      - main\n      - release/*\n    tags:\n      - ciflow/slow/*\n  schedule:\n    - cron: 29 8 * * *  # about 1:29am PDT, for mem leak check and rerun disabled tests\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}-${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' }}-${{ github.event.schedule }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\npermissions:\n  id-token: write\n  contents: read\n\njobs:\n  llm-td:\n    if: github.repository_owner == 'pytorch'\n    name: before-test\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/llm_td_retrieval.yml\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n\n  target-determination:\n    name: before-test\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/target_determination.yml\n    needs: llm-td\n    permissions:\n      id-token: write\n      contents: read\n\n  get-label-type:\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    if: ${{ (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' }}\n    with:\n      triggering_actor: ${{ github.triggering_actor }}\n      issue_owner: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login || github.event.issue.user.login }}\n      curr_branch: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n\n  linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm86-build:\n    name: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm86\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm86\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda12.8-cudnn9-py3-gcc11\n      cuda-arch-list: 8.6\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"slow\", shard: 1, num_shards: 3, runner: \"linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu\" },\n          { config: \"slow\", shard: 2, num_shards: 3, runner: \"linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu\" },\n          { config: \"slow\", shard: 3, num_shards: 3, runner: \"linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu\" },\n        ]}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm86-test:\n    name: linux-jammy-cuda12.8-py3.10-gcc11-sm86\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs:\n      - linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm86-build\n      - target-determination\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm86-build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm86-build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-cuda12_8-py3_10-gcc11-sm86-build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-jammy-cuda13_0-py3_10-gcc11-sm86-build:\n    name: linux-jammy-cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm86\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm86\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-cuda13.0-cudnn9-py3-gcc11\n      cuda-arch-list: 8.6\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"slow\", shard: 1, num_shards: 3, runner: \"linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu\" },\n          { config: \"slow\", shard: 2, num_shards: 3, runner: \"linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu\" },\n          { config: \"slow\", shard: 3, num_shards: 3, runner: \"linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu\" },\n        ]}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-jammy-cuda13_0-py3_10-gcc11-sm86-test:\n    name: linux-jammy-cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm86\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs:\n      - linux-jammy-cuda13_0-py3_10-gcc11-sm86-build\n      - target-determination\n    with:\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-cuda13.0-py3.10-gcc11-sm86\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-cuda13_0-py3_10-gcc11-sm86-build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-cuda13_0-py3_10-gcc11-sm86-build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-jammy-py3_10-clang12-build:\n    name: linux-jammy-py3.10-clang12\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-py3.10-clang12\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-py3.10-clang12\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"slow\", shard: 1, num_shards: 2, runner: \"linux.2xlarge\" },\n          { config: \"slow\", shard: 2, num_shards: 2, runner: \"linux.2xlarge\" },\n        ]}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-jammy-py3_10-clang12-test:\n    name: linux-jammy-py3.10-clang12\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs:\n      - linux-jammy-py3_10-clang12-build\n      - target-determination\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-py3_10-clang12-build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-py3_10-clang12-build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-py3_10-clang12-build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-jammy-py3_10-clang18-asan-build:\n    name: linux-jammy-py3.10-clang18-asan\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      runner: linux.2xlarge.memory\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n      build-environment: linux-jammy-py3.10-clang18-asan\n      docker-image-name: ci-image:pytorch-linux-jammy-py3-clang18-asan\n      test-matrix: |\n        { include: [\n          { config: \"slow\", shard: 1, num_shards: 3, runner: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.4xlarge\" },\n          { config: \"slow\", shard: 2, num_shards: 3, runner: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.4xlarge\" },\n          { config: \"slow\", shard: 3, num_shards: 3, runner: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}linux.4xlarge\" },\n        ]}\n      sync-tag: asan-build\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-jammy-py3_10-clang18-asan-test:\n    name: linux-jammy-py3.10-clang18-asan\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n    needs:\n      - linux-jammy-py3_10-clang18-asan-build\n      - target-determination\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-py3_10-clang18-asan-build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-py3_10-clang18-asan-build.outputs.docker-image }}\n      test-matrix: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-py3_10-clang18-asan-build.outputs.test-matrix }}\n      sync-tag: asan-test\n    secrets: inherit\n''',\n    '.github/workflows/inductor-perf-test-nightly-aarch64.yml': open('/tmp/aarch64_content.txt', 'w').close() or '''name: inductor-perf-nightly-aarch64\n\non:\n  schedule:\n    - cron: 0 7 * * *\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      training:\n        description: Run training (off by default)?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      inference:\n        description: Run inference (on by default)?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: true\n      default:\n        description: Run inductor_default?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: true\n      dynamic:\n        description: Run inductor_dynamic_shapes?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      cppwrapper:\n        description: Run inductor_cpp_wrapper?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      aotinductor:\n        description: Run aot_inductor for inference?\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n        default: false\n      benchmark_configs:\n        description: The list of configs used the benchmark\n        required: false\n        type: string\n        default: inductor_huggingface_perf_cpu_aarch64,inductor_timm_perf_cpu_aarch64,inductor_torchbench_perf_cpu_aarch64\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.pull_request.number || github.ref_name }}-${{ github.ref_type == 'branch' && github.sha }}-${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}-${{ github.event_name == 'schedule' }}\n  cancel-in-progress: true\n\npermissions:\n  id-token: write\n  contents: read\n\njobs:\n  get-label-type:\n    name: get-label-type\n    uses: pytorch/pytorch/.github/workflows/_runner-determinator.yml@release/2.10\n    if: ${{ (github.event_name != 'schedule' || github.repository == 'pytorch/pytorch') && github.repository_owner == 'pytorch' github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}\n      curr_ref_type: ${{ github.ref_type }}\n      opt_out_experiments: lf\n\n  linux-jammy-aarch64-py3_10-inductor-build:\n    name: linux-jammy-aarch64-py3.10-inductor\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-build.yml\n    needs: get-label-type\n    with:\n      runner_prefix: \"${{ needs.get-label-type.outputs.label-type }}\"\n \"inductor_torchbench_perf_cpu_aarch64\", shard: 14, num_shards: 15, runner: \"linux.arm64.m7g.metal\" },\n          { config: \"inductor_torchbench_perf_cpu_aarch64\", shard: 15, num_shards: 15, runner: \"linux.arm64.m7g.metal\" },\n        ]}\n       selected-test-configs: ${{ inputs.benchmark_configs }}\n      build-additional-packages: \"vision audio torchao\"\n    secrets: inherit\n\n   if: github.event.schedule == '0 7 * * *'\n    with:\n      build-environment: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-aarch64-py3_10-inductor-build.outputs.build-environment }}\n      dashboard-tag: training-false-inference-true-default-true-dynamic-true-cppwrapper-true-aotinductor-true\n      docker-image: ${{ needs.linux-jammy-aarch64-py3_10-inductor-build.outputs.docker-image }}\n monitor-data-collect-interval: 4\n    secrets: inherit\n\n  linux-jammy-aarch64-py3_10-inductor-test:\n    name: linux-jammy-aarch64-py3.10-inductor\n    uses: ./.github/workflows/_linux-test.yml\n
